exampleEn: High absenteeism rates often indicate low employee morale in the workplace.
exampleZh: 高 absenteeism 率通常表明工作场所员工士气低落

exampleEn: Women remain underrepresented in senior positions across academia worldwide.
exampleZh: 全球 academia 中女性在高级职位上的代表性仍然不足

exampleEn: Setting clear milestones helps teams accomplish complex projects more efficiently.
exampleZh: 设定清晰的里程碑有助于团队更高效地 accomplish 复杂项目

exampleEn: The university is fully accredited by the national education quality assurance agency.
exampleZh: 该大学已获得国家教育质量保证机构的完全 accredit

exampleEn: Professional skills accrue over time through consistent practice and real-world experience.
exampleZh: 专业技能通过持续的实践和现实经验逐渐 accrue

exampleEn: Students who are adept at critical thinking tend to perform better in university examinations.
exampleZh: adept 于批判性思维的学生往往在大学考试中表现更好

exampleEn: Many universities rely heavily on adjunct professors to teach introductory undergraduate courses.
exampleZh: 许多大学严重依赖 adjunct 教授来教授本科入门课程

exampleEn: The admission process for top universities has become increasingly competitive over the past decade.
exampleZh: 顶尖大学的 admission 流程在过去十年中变得竞争日益激烈

exampleEn: Continuous professional development is essential for career advancement in the technology sector.
exampleZh: 持续的专业发展对于科技行业的 career advancement 至关重要

exampleEn: The research center maintains an affiliation with three major European universities.
exampleZh: 该研究中心与三所主要欧洲大学保持着 affiliation

exampleEn: Managers must allocate training budgets fairly across all departments within the organization.
exampleZh: 管理者必须在组织内所有部门之间公平地 allocate 培训预算

exampleEn: Employers increasingly value analytical skills over rote memorization in their graduate recruits.
exampleZh: 雇主在招聘毕业生时越来越看重 analytical 技能而非死记硬背

exampleEn: The apprenticeship program combines classroom learning with hands-on industry experience.
exampleZh: apprenticeship 项目将课堂学习与实践行业经验相结合

exampleEn: Standardized tests are designed to measure a student's academic aptitude across various subjects.
exampleZh: 标准化测试旨在衡量学生在各个学科上的学术 aptitude

exampleEn: The final assignment requires students to analyze a real-world business case study in depth.
exampleZh: 最终 assignment 要求学生深入分析一个真实世界的商业案例研究

exampleEn: Educational attainment has a strong correlation with lifelong earning potential and career satisfaction.
exampleZh: 教育 attainment 与终身收入潜力和职业满意度有很强的相关性

exampleEn: High teacher attrition rates in rural areas have created severe staffing shortages in public schools.
exampleZh: 农村地区的高教师 attrition 率导致了公立学校严重的人员短缺

exampleEn: Modern classrooms are increasingly equipped with audiovisual technology to enhance student engagement.
exampleZh: 现代教室越来越多地配备 audiovisual 技术以提高学生的参与度

exampleEn: A bachelor degree remains the minimum educational requirement for most professional career paths.
exampleZh: bachelor 学位仍然是大多数职业道路的最低教育要求

exampleEn: The government bursary enables students from low-income families to attend university without incurring debt.
exampleZh: 政府 bursary 使低收入家庭的学生能够上大学而不会负债

exampleEn: The university campus features state-of-the-art laboratories and collaborative learning spaces for students.
exampleZh: 大学 campus 设有最先进的实验室和协作学习空间供学生使用

exampleEn: Students should consult the course catalog before selecting their elective modules each semester.
exampleZh: 学生应在每学期选择选修模块之前查阅课程 catalog

exampleEn: The program is designed to certify teachers in specialized areas such as bilingual education and special needs.
exampleZh: 该项目旨在 certify 教师在双语教育和特殊需求等专业领域的资格

exampleEn: Clerical skills such as data entry and document management remain important in many office environments.
exampleZh: clerical 技能如数据录入和文档管理在许多办公环境中仍然很重要

exampleEn: An experienced career coach can help graduates navigate the challenging job market more effectively.
exampleZh: 一位经验丰富的职业 coach 可以帮助毕业生更有效地应对充满挑战的就业市场

exampleEn: The weekly colloquium provides graduate students with opportunities to present their research to peers and faculty.
exampleZh: 每周的 colloquium 为研究生提供了向同行和教师展示研究的机会

exampleEn: The professor commended the student for her exceptionally well-researched and clearly argued term paper.
exampleZh: 教授 commend 了该学生那篇研究极为充分且论证清晰的学期论文

exampleEn: Employers are increasingly focusing on competency-based hiring rather than relying solely on academic credentials.
exampleZh: 雇主越来越注重基于 competency 的招聘 而不是仅仅依赖学历证书

exampleEn: The course completion rate has improved significantly since the introduction of online support resources.
exampleZh: 自引入在线支持资源以来 课程 completion 率显著提高

exampleEn: All academic institutions must demonstrate compliance with national data protection and privacy regulations.
exampleZh: 所有学术机构必须展示对国家数据保护和隐私法规的 compliance

exampleEn: The research team plans to conduct a large-scale survey across twenty universities in six countries.
exampleZh: 研究团队计划在六个国家的二十所大学 conduct 一项大规模调查

exampleEn: The university will confer honorary degrees upon three distinguished scholars at the graduation ceremony.
exampleZh: 大学将在毕业典礼上 confer 三位杰出学者的荣誉学位

exampleEn: Maintaining continuity in the curriculum is essential when experienced teachers leave a school unexpectedly.
exampleZh: 当经验丰富的教师意外离开学校时 保持课程的 continuity 至关重要

exampleEn: Cooperative learning activities help students develop essential teamwork and communication abilities.
exampleZh: cooperative 学习活动帮助学生发展必要的团队合作和沟通能力

exampleEn: School counselors play a vital role in supporting students' academic progress and emotional wellbeing.
exampleZh: 学校 counselor 在支持学生学业进步和情感健康方面发挥着至关重要的作用

exampleEn: The master's program is assessed through a combination of coursework and a final research dissertation.
exampleZh: 该硕士项目通过 coursework 和最终研究论文的结合来评估学生

exampleEn: The dean of the faculty announced a new initiative to promote interdisciplinary research across departments.
exampleZh: 学院 dean 宣布了一项新倡议 旨在促进跨部门的 interdisciplinary 研究

exampleEn: A high school diploma is the minimum educational qualification required for most entry-level positions.
exampleZh: 高中 diploma 是大多数初级职位所需的最低教育资格

exampleEn: Writing a doctoral dissertation requires years of original research and careful academic argumentation.
exampleZh: 撰写博士 dissertation 需要多年的原创研究和仔细的学术论证

exampleEn: Earning a doctorate typically requires between three and seven years of intensive study beyond a master's degree.
exampleZh: 获得 doctorate 通常需要在硕士学位之后进行三到七年的密集研究

exampleEn: The high school dropout rate has declined steadily as more support programs have been introduced nationwide.
exampleZh: 随着全国范围内引入更多支持计划 高中 dropout 率稳步下降

exampleEn: More than five thousand new students enroll at the university each academic year from over sixty countries.
exampleZh: 每年有超过五千名来自六十多个国家的新生 enroll 于该大学

exampleEn: The final examination accounts for sixty percent of the total course grade for most undergraduate modules.
exampleZh: 期末考试 examination 占大多数本科模块课程总成绩的百分之六十

exampleEn: Participation in extracurricular activities helps students develop leadership and social skills beyond the classroom.
exampleZh: 参与 extracurricular 活动有助于学生在课堂之外发展领导力和社交技能

exampleEn: The engineering faculty has recruited twelve new professors specializing in artificial intelligence research.
exampleZh: 工程 faculty 已经招聘了十二位专门从事人工智能研究的新教授

exampleEn: Constructive feedback from instructors helps students identify specific areas for academic improvement.
exampleZh: 来自教师的建设性 feedback 帮助学生确定学业改进的具体领域

exampleEn: The research fellowship provides full funding for doctoral candidates to pursue innovative scientific investigations.
exampleZh: 该研究 fellowship 为博士候选人提供全额资金以 pursue 创新的科学调查

exampleEn: Formative assessment throughout the semester allows teachers to adjust their instruction based on student progress.
exampleZh: 整个学期的 formative 评估使教师能够根据学生的进展调整教学

exampleEn: Approximately eighty percent of students who enroll in the program successfully graduate within four years.
exampleZh: 约百分之八十注册该项目的学生在四年内成功 graduate

exampleEn: All new employees receive a comprehensive handbook outlining company policies and professional expectations.
exampleZh: 所有新员工都会收到一本全面的 handbook 概述公司政策和职业期望

exampleEn: Students who maintain a grade point average above 3.8 are eligible for the honors program each semester.
exampleZh: 每学期保持平均绩点3.8以上的学生有资格参加 honors 项目

exampleEn: The course instructor has over fifteen years of industry experience in software engineering and system design.
exampleZh: 该课程 instructor 在软件工程和系统设计方面拥有超过十五年的行业经验

exampleEn: The summer intern program gives university students valuable hands-on experience in a professional environment.
exampleZh: 暑期 intern 项目让大学生在专业环境中获得宝贵的实践经验

exampleEn: Access to quality kindergarten education has been shown to improve children's long-term academic outcomes significantly.
exampleZh: 获得优质的 kindergarten 教育已被证明可以显著改善儿童的长期学业成果

exampleEn: Students spend at least six hours per week conducting experiments in the chemistry laboratory under supervision.
exampleZh: 学生每周至少花费六小时在监督下于化学 laboratory 进行实验

exampleEn: The guest lecture by the Nobel laureate attracted over eight hundred students from various academic departments.
exampleZh: 诺贝尔奖得主的 guest lecture 吸引了来自不同学术部门的八百多名学生

exampleEn: International students must fulfill additional language requirements before they can matriculate at the university.
exampleZh: 国际学生必须满足额外的语言要求才能在该大学 matriculate

exampleEn: Each junior employee is paired with a senior mentor who provides guidance throughout their first year.
exampleZh: 每位初级员工都配有一位资深 mentor 在其第一年提供指导

exampleEn: The business school boasts a ninety-five percent graduate employment placement rate within six months of graduation.
exampleZh: 该商学院 boasts 毕业生在毕业后六个月内就业 placement 率达到百分之九十五

exampleEn: Universities use sophisticated software to detect plagiarism in student essays and research papers submitted online.
exampleZh: 大学使用 sophisticated 软件来检测在线提交的学生论文和研究报告中的 plagiarism

exampleEn: Art and design students must submit a digital portfolio showcasing their best creative work for admission review.
exampleZh: 艺术和设计专业的学生必须提交一个数字 portfolio 展示他们最好的创意作品以供入学审查

exampleEn: The teaching practicum gives future educators an opportunity to apply theory in real classroom settings.
exampleZh: 教学 practicum 给未来教育者提供了在真实课堂环境中应用理论的机会

exampleEn: A strong background in statistics is a prerequisite for enrollment in the advanced data analytics course.
exampleZh: 扎实的统计学背景是注册高级数据分析课程的 prerequisite

exampleEn: New teachers typically serve a one-year probation period before being offered permanent employment contracts.
exampleZh: 新教师在获得永久雇佣合同之前通常需要经过一年的 probation 期

exampleEn: Online examinations now use remote proctor technology to maintain academic integrity and prevent cheating.
exampleZh: 在线考试现在使用远程 proctor 技术来维护学术诚信和防止作弊

exampleEn: Language proficiency tests assess reading writing listening and speaking skills across multiple difficulty levels.
exampleZh: 语言 proficiency 测试评估多个难度级别的听说读写技能

exampleEn: The classroom is equipped with a high-definition projector for displaying multimedia presentations and educational videos.
exampleZh: 教室配备了一台高清 projector 用于显示多媒体演示和教育视频

exampleEn: The teacher provided a writing prompt to help students begin their creative essays during the examination.
exampleZh: 老师提供了一个写作 prompt 来帮助学生在考试期间开始他们的创意作文

exampleEn: The university prospectus provides detailed information about all degree programs and campus facilities available.
exampleZh: 大学 prospectus 提供了关于所有学位课程和校园设施的详细信息

exampleEn: Candidates must qualify through a rigorous selection process before being admitted to the doctoral program.
exampleZh: 候选人必须通过严格的选拔过程 qualify 后才能被录取进入博士项目

exampleEn: Remedial classes are offered to students who need additional support in mathematics and English language skills.
exampleZh: 为需要在数学和英语技能方面获得额外支持的学生提供 remedial 课程

exampleEn: Spaced repetition is a proven learning technique that helps students retain vocabulary and concepts over the long term.
exampleZh: 间隔 repetition 是一种经过验证的学习技巧 可以帮助学生长期保留词汇和概念

exampleEn: The professor decided to resign from his tenured position to pursue a career in educational technology entrepreneurship.
exampleZh: 这位教授决定 resign 他的终身职位 以从事教育科技创业事业

exampleEn: Students who actively take handwritten notes tend to retain information more effectively than those who type on laptops.
exampleZh: 主动手写笔记的学生往往比在笔记本电脑上打字的学生更有效地 retain 信息

exampleEn: The professor spent her sabbatical year conducting field research in remote communities across Southeast Asia.
exampleZh: 这位教授利用她的 sabbatical 年在东南亚偏远社区进行实地研究

exampleEn: The distinguished scholar has published over one hundred peer-reviewed articles in leading international journals.
exampleZh: 这位 distinguished scholar 在 leading 国际期刊上发表了超过一百篇同行评审文章

exampleEn: The spring semester begins in February and ends with final examinations scheduled for the middle of June.
exampleZh: 春季 semester 从二月开始 到六月中旬安排的期末考试结束

exampleEn: The graduate seminar meets weekly to discuss recent developments in cognitive neuroscience and brain research.
exampleZh: 研究生 seminar 每周举行一次 讨论认知神经科学和大脑研究的最新发展

exampleEn: The course syllabus outlines all required readings assignment deadlines and grading criteria for the entire semester.
exampleZh: 课程 syllabus 列出了整个学期的所有必读材料 作业截止日期和评分标准

exampleEn: Achieving tenure is a significant milestone in an academic career providing long-term job security at universities.
exampleZh: 获得 tenure 是学术生涯中的一个重要里程碑 为大学提供长期的工作保障

exampleEn: The digital textbook includes interactive exercises and video explanations that enhance the learning experience for students.
exampleZh: 数字 textbook 包括互动练习和视频解释 增强了学生的学习体验

exampleEn: The master thesis must present original research and demonstrate the student's ability to analyze complex data independently.
exampleZh: 硕士 thesis 必须呈现原创研究 并展示学生独立分析复杂数据的能力

exampleEn: Each new trainee undergoes an intensive six-week onboarding program before being assigned to a specific department.
exampleZh: 每位新 trainee 在被分配到特定部门之前都要经过为期六周的密集入职培训

exampleEn: Employers often request an official academic transcript to verify a candidate's educational qualifications and grades.
exampleZh: 雇主经常要求提供官方 academic transcript 以核实候选人的教育资格和成绩

exampleEn: Rising university tuition fees have sparked widespread debate about the accessibility of higher education for all.
exampleZh: 不断上涨的大学 tuition 费用引发了关于高等教育普及性的广泛 debate

exampleEn: A private tutor can provide personalized instruction that addresses a student's specific learning needs and challenges.
exampleZh: 私人 tutor 可以提供个性化的教学 解决学生特定的学习需求和挑战

exampleEn: The undergraduate program offers a broad foundation in liberal arts before students specialize in their chosen major field.
exampleZh: undergraduate 项目在学生专攻所选专业领域之前提供了广泛的 liberal arts 基础

exampleEn: The doctoral candidate successfully defended her research in a three-hour viva examination before a panel of five experts.
exampleZh: 该博士候选人成功在五位专家组成的 panel 面前以三小时的 viva 考试答辩了她的研究

exampleEn: Large-scale afforestation projects can help absorb carbon dioxide and combat the effects of climate change.
exampleZh: 大规模 afforestation 项目有助于吸收二氧化碳并应对气候变化的影响

exampleEn: Over-extraction of underground aquifer reserves has led to severe water shortages in many agricultural regions worldwide.
exampleZh: 过度开采地下 aquifer 储量已导致全球许多农业地区出现严重的水资源短缺

exampleEn: Biomass energy derived from agricultural waste offers a renewable alternative to traditional fossil fuel sources.
exampleZh: 源自农业废弃物的 biomass 能源为传统 fossil fuel 来源提供了可再生能源替代方案

exampleEn: Implementing a carbon tax has proven effective in reducing industrial emissions in several European countries.
exampleZh: 实施 carbon 税已被证明在减少几个欧洲国家的工业排放方面是有效的

exampleEn: Chlorophyll enables plants to convert sunlight into chemical energy through the remarkable process of photosynthesis.
exampleZh: chlorophyll 使植物能够通过 photosynthesis 这一 remarkable 过程将阳光转化为化学能

exampleEn: Wetlands naturally cleanse water by filtering out pollutants and sediment before they reach downstream rivers and lakes.
exampleZh: 湿地通过过滤污染物和沉积物自然地 cleanse 水体 在其到达下游河流和湖泊之前

exampleEn: Households can significantly reduce their landfill waste by turning kitchen scraps into nutrient-rich compost for gardening.
exampleZh: 家庭可以通过将厨房残渣转化为用于园艺的 nutrient-rich compost 来显著减少垃圾填埋场的 waste

exampleEn: Groundwater contamination from industrial chemicals poses long-term health risks to communities that rely on well water.
exampleZh: 工业化学品造成的地下水 contamination 对依赖井水的社区构成长期健康风险

exampleEn: Rising ocean temperatures cause coral bleaching which threatens the survival of entire marine ecosystems globally.
exampleZh: 海洋温度上升导致 coral 白化 这威胁着全球整个海洋生态系统的生存

exampleEn: The hydroelectric dam generates enough clean electricity to power approximately two million homes across the region.
exampleZh: 该水力发电 dam 产生足够的清洁电力 为该地区约两百万户家庭供电

exampleEn: Urban noise levels often exceed eighty decibels during peak traffic hours affecting residents' sleep quality and mental health.
exampleZh: 城市噪音水平在高峰交通时段往往超过八十 decibel 影响居民的睡眠质量和心理健康

exampleEn: Plastic bottles can take up to four hundred and fifty years to fully decompose in the natural environment after disposal.
exampleZh: 塑料瓶在 disposal 后可能需要长达四百五十年才能在自然环境中完全 decompose

exampleEn: Many European cities plan to ban diesel vehicles from their city centers by the end of this decade to improve air quality.
exampleZh: 许多欧洲城市计划在本十年末之前禁止 diesel 车辆进入市中心以改善空气质量

exampleEn: Prolonged drought conditions across the continent have devastated agricultural production and threatened food security for millions.
exampleZh: 整个大陆的 prolonged drought 状况已经摧毁了农业产量并威胁到数百万人的粮食安全

exampleEn: Coastal dune systems act as natural barriers protecting inland areas from storm surges and rising sea levels.
exampleZh: 沿海 dune 系统充当 natural barriers 保护内陆地区免受风暴潮和海平面上升的影响

exampleEn: The introduction of invasive species can disrupt the delicate balance of an entire ecosystem within just a few years.
exampleZh: 引入 invasive species 可以在短短几年内 disrupt 整个 ecosystem 的微妙平衡

exampleEn: The factory was heavily fined for discharging untreated industrial effluent directly into the nearby river system.
exampleZh: 该工厂因直接向附近河流系统排放未经处理的工业 effluent 而被处以 heavy fines

exampleEn: Conservation programs have helped several endangered species recover from the brink of extinction over the past two decades.
exampleZh: Conservation 项目已帮助 several endangered species 在过去二十年中从灭绝边缘恢复

exampleEn: Excessive use of chemical fertilizer in agriculture contributes to water pollution through runoff into nearby streams and lakes.
exampleZh: 农业中过度使用化学 fertilizer 通过径流进入附近的溪流和湖泊导致水污染

exampleEn: The island's unique flora has evolved in isolation over millions of years making it a priority for conservation efforts globally.
exampleZh: 该岛屿独特的 flora 在数百万年的隔离中 evolve 使其成为全球 conservation 工作的优先事项

exampleEn: The global transition away from fossil fuels toward renewable energy sources is accelerating due to climate policy commitments.
exampleZh: 由于气候政策承诺 全球从 fossil fuel 向可再生能源的 transition 正在加速

exampleEn: Iceland generates nearly one hundred percent of its electricity from geothermal and hydroelectric renewable energy sources.
exampleZh: 冰岛 nearly 百分之百的电力来自 geothermal 和水力发电的可再生能源

exampleEn: Scientists have documented alarming rates of glacier retreat in both polar regions and high mountain ranges worldwide.
exampleZh: 科学家记录了两极地区和全球高山山脉中 alarming 的 glacier 退缩速度

exampleEn: Reducing greenhouse gas emissions from agriculture and transportation is essential for meeting international climate goals.
exampleZh: 减少农业和交通的 greenhouse 气体排放对于实现国际气候目标至关重要

exampleEn: Modernizing the national electricity grid is essential for integrating renewable energy from solar and wind farms across the country.
exampleZh: 现代化国家电力 grid 对于整合全国太阳能和风力发电场的可再生能源至关重要

exampleEn: Over-pumping of groundwater for irrigation has caused land subsidence in many agricultural regions throughout Asia.
exampleZh: 过度抽取 groundwater 用于灌溉已导致亚洲许多农业地区的地面沉降

exampleEn: A sudden gust of wind damaged several wind turbine blades at the offshore renewable energy installation site.
exampleZh: 一阵突如其来的 gust 损坏了海上可再生能源安装点的 several 风力涡轮叶片

exampleEn: Strict regulations govern the transportation and disposal of hazardous chemical waste from industrial manufacturing facilities.
exampleZh: 严格的规定 govern 工业制造设施 hazardous 化学废物的运输和 disposal

exampleEn: Hybrid vehicles that combine electric motors with traditional engines can reduce fuel consumption by up to fifty percent.
exampleZh: 将电动机与传统发动机结合的 hybrid 车辆可以将燃油消耗降低多达百分之五十

exampleEn: The hydroelectric dam project has faced significant opposition due to its potential impact on downstream river ecosystems.
exampleZh: 该 hydroelectric 大坝项目因其对下游河流生态系统的潜在影响而面临 significant opposition

exampleEn: Many municipalities incinerate non-recyclable waste to generate electricity while reducing the volume sent to overflowing landfills.
exampleZh: 许多市政当局 incinerate 不可回收的废物以发电 同时减少送往 overflowing 垃圾填埋场的废物量

exampleEn: The average household in developed nations consumes approximately ten thousand kilowatt hours of electricity per year.
exampleZh: 发达国家的平均家庭每年消耗大约一万 kilowatt 小时的电力

exampleEn: Reducing the amount of waste sent to landfill sites requires improved recycling systems and changes in consumer behavior worldwide.
exampleZh: 减少送往 landfill 场地的废物量需要改善回收系统和改变全球消费者行为

exampleEn: Livestock farming produces substantial amounts of methane gas which traps heat far more effectively than carbon dioxide in the atmosphere.
exampleZh: 畜牧业产生大量的 methane 气体 其在 atmosphere 中捕集热量的效果远高于二氧化碳

exampleEn: Microplastic pollution has been detected in drinking water supplies and even in the deepest parts of the world's oceans.

exampleEn: Traditional Chinese calligraphy is regarded as one of the highest forms of visual artistic expression requiring decades of dedicated disciplined practice to truly master the subtle brush techniques.

exampleEn: The Gothic cathedral took over two centuries to complete and its soaring stone arches and magnificent stained glass windows continue to inspire visitors from around the world today.

exampleEn: The medieval chronicle provides a fascinating detailed year-by-year account of everyday life political intrigue and natural disasters during the turbulent twelfth century in England.

exampleEn: Classical music education has been shown to improve children's mathematical reasoning spatial awareness and fine motor coordination skills during their critical early developmental years significantly.

exampleZh: 历史教育在大多数欧洲国家的中学是 compulsory 的 反映了 understanding the past is essential for responsible and informed democratic citizenship today 的共同信念

exampleZh: 该保险公司雇有一支 highly skilled actuary professionals 团队 他们使用 complex statistical models 计算保费并 accurately assess long-term financial risk exposure

exampleZh: An independent external auditor must review the company's annual financial statements before they can be officially published and distributed to shareholders and the general investing public for transparency

exampleEn: The controversial government bailout of the failing automotive manufacturer sparked intense public debate about whether taxpayers should bear the financial risk of private corporate mismanagement and poor business decisions.
exampleZh: The controversial government bailout of the failing automotive manufacturer sparked intense public debate about whether taxpayers should bear the financial risk of private corporate mismanagement and poor business decisions

exampleEn: Analysts have turned increasingly bearish on the technology sector following three consecutive quarters of slowing revenue growth and rising operating costs across most major companies in the industry segment.
exampleZh: 在连续三个季度 revenue growth slowing and rising operating costs across most major companies in the industry segment 之后分析师对技术部门越来越 bearish

exampleZh: Life insurance policy 指定 policyholder's spouse and two children 为 equal beneficiary 在 insured individual untimely passing 的事件中有权 receive full death benefit amount

exampleZh: Several major international corporations emerged as potential bidder for the government infrastructure contract worth an estimated total value of over four billion dollars over the ten-year project period

exampleZh: Corporate bondholder 有权在 bond 的整个生命期内 receive regular fixed interest payments 并在 bond eventually reaches its maturity date years later 时 receive return of their original principal investment

exampleZh: 准确的复式 bookkeeping 要求每笔 financial transaction 被记录在 at least two separate accounts 中 以始终保持 assets equaling liabilities plus owner equity 的 fundamental accounting equation

exampleZh: Paris bourse 的起源可追溯至十八世纪初 使其成为迄今为止世界上 oldest continuously operating formal stock exchanges 之一

exampleZh: Online brokerage platforms have dramatically reduced the cost of buying and selling shares for individual retail investors by eliminating the need for expensive traditional full-service stockbroker intermediaries and their associated high commissions

exampleZh: Despite short-term market volatility many long-term institutional investors remain bullish on renewable energy stocks citing strong government policy support and rapidly improving underlying clean technology economics worldwide

exampleZh: 正面的 operating cashflow 表明公司的 core business activities 正在 generate enough money 以支付其 day-to-day expenses 而无需 rely on external borrowing or the sale of long-term company assets to survive

exampleZh: 银行通常要求借款人 pledge valuable collateral 如 real estate or investment portfolios 才 approve large commercial loans 以 protect themselves against the risk of potential borrower default and non-payment

exampleEn: Global commodities markets play a vital role in determining the prices of essential raw materials including crude oil wheat copper and iron ore that underpin the entire modern industrial world economy.
exampleZh: Global commodities markets 在决定 essential raw materials including crude oil wheat copper and iron ore 的价格方面 play a vital role 这些原材料支撑着整个 modern industrial world economy

exampleEn: The multinational conglomerate owns businesses spanning sectors as diverse as aerospace engineering luxury fashion retail consumer electronics manufacturing and international hotel hospitality management across over sixty countries worldwide.
exampleZh: 该 multinational conglomerate 拥有跨越 aerospace engineering luxury fashion retail consumer electronics manufacturing and international hotel hospitality management 等 sectors 的业务 遍布全球 over sixty countries

exampleZh: 该 gallery accepted several valuable paintings on consignment from a private collector agreeing to display and attempt to sell the artworks in exchange for a thirty percent commission on any final sale price achieved

exampleZh: 由 leading pharmaceutical companies and government research agencies 组成的 international consortium 已 pledge over two billion dollars 以 accelerate the development of new vaccines for emerging infectious diseases threatening global public health

exampleEn: Critics of modern consumerism argue that the relentless pursuit of material goods and the constant pressure to acquire ever more possessions contributes significantly to environmental degradation and widespread psychological dissatisfaction in affluent societies.
exampleZh: Modern consumerism 的 critics 认为 relentless pursuit of material goods 和 constant pressure to acquire ever more possessions 在 affluent societies 中 significantly contributes to environmental degradation and widespread psychological dissatisfaction

exampleZh: convertible bonds 给予投资者在 certain pre-agreed market conditions and share price levels 下在 specified future dates 将其 debt holdings exchange 为 predetermined number of the issuing company's common shares 的 option

exampleZh: 该音乐人的 legal team filed a formal lawsuit alleging that the streaming platform had knowingly violated international copyright law by distributing her original songs without obtaining proper licensing permission or paying any royalties whatsoever

exampleZh: Blockchain technology 本质上作为 immutable public digital ledger 运作 在 decentralized global network of independent computers 上 permanently recording every verified transaction 而无需 any central trusted authority or intermediary institution to validate the data

exampleZh: Companies sometimes use excessive financial leverage by borrowing heavily to fund rapid expansion which can dramatically amplify shareholder returns during prosperous economic times but also multiply losses just as severely when business conditions inevitably deteriorate and decline

exampleZh: 根据世界上大多数 developed legal jurisdictions 中 established principles of commercial law Company directors can be held personally liable for major financial losses resulting from gross negligence or deliberate misconduct in the management of corporate affairs

exampleZh: microloan programs 已经 empower 了发展中国家数百万 small-scale entrepreneurs 用仅几百美元的 initial seed capital start or expand tiny businesses 而 traditional commercial banks would never consider worth lending to them

exampleZh: Rising interest rates 使得数百万 homeowners 的 monthly mortgage payments significantly more expensive 这些 homeowners 在 several years ago 之前的 historically low borrowing costs 期间用 variable-rate loans 为 their properties 提供资金

exampleZh: Large multinational companies 必须 simultaneously 在数十个不同国家 navigate an increasingly complex web of different tax laws employment regulations and environmental standards 同时 maintaining consistent global business operations and protecting their international corporate reputations

exampleZh: 许多 technology companies 选择将其 customer support operations outsource 给其他国家的 specialized service providers 那里的 labor costs are significantly lower than in their domestic home markets of North America and Western Europe

exampleZh: 许多工人 increasingly concerned that their employer-sponsored pension plans may not provide sufficient retirement income to maintain a comfortable standard of living throughout what could potentially be two or even three decades of post-employment life ahead of them

exampleZh: Sustained long-term profitability 要求公司 continuously innovate adapt to changing market conditions and maintain a disciplined approach to controlling operating costs 同时 simultaneously investing adequately in future growth opportunities and competitive positioning

exampleZh: 这家小书店的 proprietor 知道大多数 regular customers 的名字 并通过 over more than twenty-five years 的 personalized friendly service and carefully curated book recommendations in the community 建立了 fiercely loyal local following

exampleZh: Financially troubled hotel chain 被法院 placed into receivership 并 appointed an independent qualified accountant 以 take control of the company's remaining assets and operations 同时 attempting to repay as much of the outstanding debt as practically possible to creditors

exampleEn: Accounting teams must carefully reconcile the company's internal financial records with the monthly statements received from all external banking partners to identify and investigate any unexplained discrepancies or potential errors before finalizing the quarterly financial reports.
exampleZh: Accounting teams 必须 carefully reconcile the company's internal financial records 与从所有 external banking partners 收到的 monthly statements 以在 finalizing the quarterly financial reports 之前 identify and investigate any unexplained discrepancies or potential errors

exampleEn: Executive remuneration packages at major publicly traded corporations have attracted significant criticism in recent years with many shareholders and the general public arguing that top executive pay has become completely disconnected from the long-term performance of the companies they lead.
exampleZh: Major publicly traded corporations 的 executive remuneration packages 近年来引起了 significant criticism 许多 shareholders 和 general public 认为 top executive pay 已经与他们所领导的公司的 long-term performance completely disconnected

exampleEn: The company announced plans to fundamentally restructure its entire global operations involving the closure of several overseas manufacturing facilities and the elimination of approximately fifteen percent of its worldwide workforce over the next two fiscal years.
exampleZh: 公司宣布 plans to fundamentally restructure its entire global operations 涉及 closure of several overseas manufacturing facilities 和 elimination of approximately fifteen percent of its worldwide workforce over the next two fiscal years

exampleEn: Traditional brick-and-mortar retailer have faced unprecedented competitive pressure from e-commerce platforms that offer consumers lower prices wider product selection and the convenience of home delivery within twenty-four hours of placing their orders online.
exampleZh: 传统实体 retailer 面临着来自 e-commerce platforms 的 unprecedented competitive pressure 这些平台 offer consumers lower prices wider product selection and the convenience of home delivery within twenty-four hours of placing their orders online

exampleEn: Activist shareholder groups have filed several resolutions demanding that the corporation disclose more detailed information about its environmental impact and set specific measurable targets for reducing greenhouse gas emissions across its entire global supply chain operations.
exampleZh: Activist shareholder groups 已经 filed several resolutions demanding that the corporation disclose more detailed information about its environmental impact and set specific measurable targets for reducing greenhouse gas emissions across its entire global supply chain operations

exampleEn: Despite facing significant short-term financial challenges from the economic downturn the company's management team remains confident that the business will remain solvent and continue to meet all of its financial obligations as they fall due over the coming reporting periods.
exampleZh: Despite facing significant short-term financial challenges from the economic downturn 公司 management team remains confident that the business will remain solvent and continue to meet all of its financial obligations as they fall due over the coming reporting periods

exampleEn: Excessive financial speculation in the housing market was widely blamed for creating a dangerous asset price bubble that eventually burst with devastating consequences for millions of ordinary homeowners and the broader global economy during the 2008 financial crisis.
exampleZh: Housing market 中的 excessive financial speculation 被广泛归咎于 creating a dangerous asset price bubble that eventually burst 在2008年金融危机期间给数百万普通 homeowners 和 broader global economy 带来 devastating consequences

exampleEn: Modern corporate governance theory emphasizes that company directors must balance the often competing interests of multiple diverse stakeholder groups including shareholders employees customers suppliers and the wider communities in which the business operates and affects.
exampleZh: Modern corporate governance theory 强调公司董事必须 balance multiple diverse stakeholder groups 的 often competing interests 包括 shareholders employees customers suppliers and the wider communities in which the business operates and affects

exampleEn: The traditional role of the human stockbroker has been largely replaced by automated digital trading platforms that execute buy and sell orders in milliseconds at a tiny fraction of the cost that human brokers previously charged for the same basic service.
exampleZh: 传统 human stockbroker 的角色已被 automated digital trading platforms largely replaced 这些平台在 milliseconds 内以 human brokers 先前 charged for the same basic service 成本的 tiny fraction execute buy and sell orders

exampleEn: The parent corporation established a wholly-owned subsidiary in Singapore to manage all of its expanding business operations across the rapidly growing Southeast Asian regional market independently from its European headquarters operations.
exampleZh: Parent corporation 在新加坡设立了一家 wholly-owned subsidiary 以 independently from its European headquarters operations 管理其在 rapidly growing Southeast Asian regional market 的所有 expanding business operations

exampleEn: The airline imposed a temporary fuel surcharge on all international ticket bookings to partially offset the significant increase in its operating costs caused by the sharp rise in global crude oil prices during the peak summer travel season.
exampleZh: 航空公司对所有 international ticket bookings 征收 temporary fuel surcharge 以 partially offset the significant increase in its operating costs caused by the sharp rise in global crude oil prices during the peak summer travel season

exampleEn: A syndicate of international banks jointly arranged the twenty-five billion dollar financing package needed to fund the construction of the massive new cross-border high-speed railway infrastructure megaproject connecting the two neighboring capital cities.
exampleZh: A syndicate of international banks jointly arranged the twenty-five billion dollar financing package needed to fund the construction of the massive new cross-border high-speed railway infrastructure megaproject connecting the two neighboring capital cities

exampleEn: The technology company vigorously defends its globally recognized trademark against any unauthorized use by competitors or counterfeiters seeking to confuse consumers and profit illegally from the established reputation and goodwill of the famous and widely trusted brand name.
exampleZh: 该科技公司 vigorously defends its globally recognized trademark against any unauthorized use by competitors or counterfeiters seeking to confuse consumers and profit illegally from the established reputation and goodwill of the famous and widely trusted brand name

exampleEn: Every electronic financial transaction processed through the banking system is logged with a unique digital identifier allowing regulators and auditors to trace and verify the complete journey of funds from origin to final destination if necessary.
exampleZh: Every electronic financial transaction processed through the banking system is logged with a unique digital identifier allowing regulators and auditors to trace and verify the complete journey of funds from origin to final destination if necessary

exampleEn: The government treasury department is responsible for managing the country's national debt issuing new government bonds to finance public spending and ensuring that sufficient funds are available to meet all scheduled debt repayment obligations as they fall due.
exampleZh: Government treasury department 负责管理该国的 national debt issuing new government bonds to finance public spending 并确保 sufficient funds are available to meet all scheduled debt repayment obligations as they fall due

exampleEn: Several major investment banks agreed to underwrite the technology company's initial public offering guaranteeing to purchase any shares that remained unsold after the public subscription period and thus assuming the financial risk of the large and complex stock market debut transaction.
exampleZh: Several major investment banks agreed to underwrite 该科技公司的 initial public offering 保证购买在 public subscription period 后仍未售出的任何 shares 从而承担这笔 large and complex stock market debut transaction 的 financial risk

exampleEn: Independent property valuation experts estimated that the commercial office building in the central business district was worth approximately one hundred and twenty million dollars based on current market conditions and recent comparable sales transactions in the same prime urban location.
exampleZh: Independent property valuation experts estimated that the commercial office building in the central business district was worth approximately one hundred and twenty million dollars based on current market conditions and recent comparable sales transactions in the same prime urban location

exampleEn: The retail chain maintains a carefully selected network of over five hundred approved vendor and supplier partners who must all comply with the company's strict ethical sourcing standards and rigorous product quality control requirements to maintain their preferred trading status.
exampleZh: Retail chain 维持着一个由 over five hundred approved vendor and supplier partners 组成的 carefully selected network 这些合作伙伴都必须 comply with the company's strict ethical sourcing standards and rigorous product quality control requirements 以 maintain their preferred trading status

exampleEn: Venture capital firms typically invest in high-risk early-stage technology startup companies in exchange for significant equity ownership stakes hoping that a few extraordinarily successful investments will generate returns large enough to more than compensate for the many other ventures that ultimately fail completely.
exampleZh: Venture capital firms 通常 invest in high-risk early-stage technology startup companies in exchange for significant equity ownership stakes 希望 a few extraordinarily successful investments 将 generate returns large enough to more than compensate for the many other ventures that ultimately fail completely

exampleEn: The bank agreed to grant a temporary loan repayment waiver to small business customers affected by the recent natural disaster allowing them to defer their scheduled loan installment payments for a period of up to six months without incurring any late penalties or additional interest charges.
exampleZh: 银行同意 grant a temporary loan repayment waiver 给受近期自然灾害影响的小企业 customers 允许他们 defer their scheduled loan installment payments for a period of up to six months without incurring any late penalties or additional interest charges

exampleEn: The manufacturer provides a comprehensive five-year warranty covering all defects in materials and workmanship though this guarantee does not extend to damage caused by improper use accidental drops or unauthorized repair attempts by unqualified third-party service technicians.
exampleZh: 制造商提供 comprehensive five-year warranty 覆盖所有材料和工艺上的 defects 尽管此 guarantee 不延伸到 improper use accidental drops or unauthorized repair attempts by unqualified third-party service technicians 造成的 damage

exampleEn: Wholesale distributors purchase goods in enormous quantities directly from manufacturers at significantly discounted per-unit prices and then resell them in smaller more manageable batches to various retail businesses that sell the products directly to end consumers.
exampleZh: wholesale distributors 以 significantly discounted per-unit prices directly from manufacturers purchase goods in enormous quantities 然后以 smaller more manageable batches 将其 resell 给 various retail businesses that sell the products directly to end consumers

exampleEn: Government bonds in developed countries typically offer relatively low yield compared to riskier corporate debt securities but provide investors with greater certainty of regular interest payments and the full eventual return of their original invested principal amount at maturity.
exampleZh: Developed countries 的 government bonds 通常提供 relatively low yield compared to riskier corporate debt securities 但为投资者提供 greater certainty of regular interest payments and the full eventual return of their original invested principal amount at maturity

exampleEn: Certain chemical compounds can absorb carbon dioxide directly from the atmosphere offering a potential technological solution for reducing greenhouse gas concentrations at a global scale.
exampleZh: 某些 chemical compounds 可以直接从 atmosphere 中 absorb carbon dioxide 为在全球范围内 reducing greenhouse gas concentrations 提供了一种 potential technological solution

exampleEn: Sulfuric acid is one of the most widely used industrial chemicals worldwide with applications ranging from fertilizer production to petroleum refining and wastewater treatment in numerous manufacturing processes globally.
exampleZh: Sulfuric acid 是全球使用最广泛的 industrial chemicals 之一 其 applications 涵盖从 fertilizer production 到 petroleum refining 和 wastewater treatment 的 numerous manufacturing processes globally

exampleEn: UV light can activate certain chemical catalysts that would otherwise remain completely inert and unreactive under normal ambient temperature and pressure conditions in a standard laboratory environment at room temperature.
exampleZh: UV light 可以 activate 某些在 normal ambient temperature and pressure conditions in a standard laboratory environment at room temperature 下否则会 remain completely inert and unreactive 的 chemical catalysts

exampleEn: The remarkable adaptation of certain deep-sea creatures to survive under crushing water pressure and in complete permanent darkness demonstrates the incredible resilience and diversity of life on our planet over evolutionary timescales spanning millions of years.
exampleZh: Certain deep-sea creatures survive under crushing water pressure and in complete permanent darkness 的 remarkable adaptation demonstrates the incredible resilience and diversity of life on our planet over evolutionary timescales spanning millions of years

exampleEn: The soil samples collected from the volcanic region were found to be highly alkaline with a measured pH value exceeding eight point five making them unsuitable for growing most common agricultural crop varieties without extensive soil treatment and chemical amendment.
exampleZh: 从 volcanic region 收集的 soil samples 被发现 highly alkaline 测量的 pH value exceeding eight point five 使得它们不适合在没有 extensive soil treatment and chemical amendment 的情况下 growing most common agricultural crop varieties

exampleEn: Steel is an alloy primarily composed of iron and a small but critically important percentage of carbon which dramatically increases the hardness tensile strength and overall durability of the resulting metallic material compared to elemental iron used alone.
exampleZh: Steel 是一种 alloy  primarily composed of iron and a small but critically important percentage of carbon 与单独使用的 elemental iron 相比 dramatically increases the hardness tensile strength and overall durability of the resulting metallic material

exampleEn: Scientists have discovered perfectly preserved ancient insects trapped inside fossilized amber dating back over one hundred million years providing an extraordinary window into the biodiversity of prehistoric ecosystems during the age of the dinosaurs that once roamed the earth.
exampleZh: 科学家在 fossilized amber 中发现了 perfectly preserved ancient insects trapped inside  date back over one hundred million years 为曾经在地球上 roam 的 dinosaurs age 期间 prehistoric ecosystems 的 biodiversity 提供了一个 extraordinary window

exampleEn: A thorough understanding of human anatomy is absolutely fundamental to the practice of medicine and surgery enabling doctors to accurately diagnose internal medical conditions and perform complex surgical operations safely without causing unintended damage to surrounding healthy organs and delicate vital tissues.
exampleZh: 对人类 anatomy 的 thorough understanding 对医学和外科的实践 absolutely fundamental 使医生能够 accurately diagnose internal medical conditions 并 safely perform complex surgical operations 而不会对 surrounding healthy organs and delicate vital tissues 造成 unintended damage

exampleEn: The research team detected an unusual magnetic anomaly deep beneath the ocean floor that geologists believe could potentially indicate the presence of a previously undiscovered massive deposit of valuable rare earth minerals essential for manufacturing modern electronic devices.
exampleZh: 研究小组在 ocean floor  deep beneath 发现了一个 unusual magnetic anomaly 地质学家认为这可能 potentially indicate the presence of a previously undiscovered massive deposit of valuable rare earth minerals essential for manufacturing modern electronic devices

exampleEn: Applied research focuses on solving specific practical problems in fields such as medicine engineering and agriculture whereas basic theoretical research aims primarily to expand fundamental human knowledge without any immediate commercial or practical application in mind initially.
exampleZh: applied research 侧重于解决 medicine engineering and agriculture 等领域中的 specific practical problems 而 basic theoretical research 主要旨在 expand fundamental human knowledge  initially 没有任何 immediate commercial or practical application in mind

exampleEn: Scientists believe that a massive asteroid impact approximately sixty-six million years ago was the primary cause of the sudden mass extinction event that wiped out the dinosaurs along with roughly three-quarters of all plant and animal species then living on Earth in a geological instant.
exampleZh: 科学家认为 approximately sixty-six million years ago a massive asteroid impact 是突然 mass extinction event 的 primary cause 这次事件 wiped out the dinosaurs 以及当时地球上生活的 roughly three-quarters of all plant and animal species in a geological instant

exampleEn: An atom consists of a dense central nucleus containing positively charged protons and electrically neutral neutrons surrounded by a cloud of negatively charged electrons orbiting at various discrete energy levels determined by the fundamental laws of quantum physics governing the subatomic realm.
exampleZh: Atom 由一个 dense central nucleus 组成 其中包含 positively charged protons 和 electrically neutral neutrons 周围环绕着 negatively charged electrons cloud orbiting at various discrete energy levels determined by the fundamental laws of quantum physics governing the subatomic realm

exampleEn: Each individual bacterium is a single-celled microscopic organism capable of reproducing rapidly under favorable environmental conditions with some species dividing into two identical daughter cells as frequently as every twenty minutes in ideal laboratory growth media at optimal temperatures.
exampleZh: 每个 individual bacterium 都是一个 single-celled microscopic organism capable of reproducing rapidly under favorable environmental conditions 在 ideal laboratory growth media at optimal temperatures 中 一些物种 dividing into two identical daughter cells 的频率每二十分钟一次

exampleEn: Laser beam technology is now used in an incredibly diverse range of modern applications from precision surgical instruments in hospital operating rooms to high-speed fiber-optic data transmission systems carrying vast amounts of internet traffic across entire ocean floors between continents.
exampleZh: Laser beam 技术现在用于 incredibly diverse range of modern applications 从 hospital operating rooms 中的 precision surgical instruments 到在 continents 之间 across entire ocean floors carrying vast amounts of internet traffic 的 high-speed fiber-optic data transmission systems

exampleEn: A chemical catalyst works by lowering the activation energy barrier required for a particular reaction to proceed allowing the transformation of reactants into products to occur far more rapidly and at significantly lower temperatures than would otherwise be thermodynamically possible without its presence.
exampleZh: Chemical catalyst 通过 lowering the activation energy barrier required for a particular reaction to proceed 来工作 allowing the transformation of reactants into products to occur far more rapidly and at significantly lower temperatures than would otherwise be thermodynamically possible without its presence

exampleEn: Humans typically inherit twenty-three chromosome from each biological parent for a total complement of forty-six arranged in twenty-three matching pairs that carry all of the genetic instructions necessary for building and maintaining a complete functioning human body throughout life.
exampleZh: 人类通常从每个 biological parent 继承 twenty-three chromosome 总共四十六条 arranged in twenty-three matching pairs 携带所有在终生中 building and maintaining a complete functioning human body 所必需的 genetic instructions

exampleEn: Modern computer processor chips contain billions of microscopic transistor etched onto silicon wafers forming incredibly complex integrated circuit that process digital information at speeds measured in billionths of a second per individual logical operation performed.
exampleZh: Modern computer processor chips 包含数十亿个 microscopic transistor etched onto silicon wafers 形成 incredibly complex integrated circuit 以每个 individual logical operation performed 数十亿分之一秒的速度 processing digital information

exampleEn: The research fellow presented her preliminary findings to a room of distinguished scientific colleague from universities and research institutes across twelve different countries at the major international academic conference held annually in Geneva Switzerland each spring.
exampleZh: Research fellow 在每年春天在 Geneva Switzerland 举行的 major international academic conference 上向来自十二个不同国家的 universities and research institutes 的 distinguished scientific colleague 介绍了她的 preliminary findings

exampleEn: Internal combustion engines convert the chemical energy stored in fossil fuels into useful mechanical work through a controlled series of rapid miniature explosions occurring inside the engine's sealed metal cylinders driving pistons that ultimately turn the vehicle's wheels through a complex transmission system.
exampleZh: Internal combustion engines 通过 controlled series of rapid miniature explosions occurring inside the engine's sealed metal cylinders 将 fossil fuels 中存储的 chemical energy convert 为 useful mechanical work 驱动活塞 最终通过 complex transmission system 转动车辆的 wheels

exampleEn: When water vapor in the warm moist air rises and encounters cooler temperatures at higher altitudes it begins to condense into tiny liquid droplets that eventually gather together to form the visible clouds we can observe floating across the sky on any given day.
exampleZh: 当 warm moist air 中的 water vapor 上升并 encounter cooler temperatures at higher altitudes 它开始 condense into tiny liquid droplets 最终聚集在一起 形成我们在任何 given day 可以 observe floating across the sky 的 visible clouds

exampleEn: Copper is widely used in electrical wiring because of its excellent electrical conductivity second only to silver among all commercially available and economically practical metallic conductor materials suitable for large-scale industrial production and widespread commercial distribution.
exampleZh: Copper 因其 excellent electrical conductivity 被广泛用于 electrical wiring 在所有 commercially available and economically practical metallic conductor materials suitable for large-scale industrial production and widespread commercial distribution 中仅次于 silver

exampleEn: The law of conservation of energy states that energy cannot be created or destroyed in an isolated system but can only be transformed from one form into another such as when chemical potential energy in food is converted into kinetic energy of muscle movement and body heat in living organisms.
exampleZh: Law of conservation of energy 指出在 isolated system 中 energy cannot be created or destroyed 只能从一种形式 transform 为另一种形式 如当 food 中的 chemical potential energy 被 convert 为 living organisms 中 muscle movement 和 body heat 的 kinetic energy 时

exampleEn: The speed of light in a vacuum is a fundamental universal constant of nature measuring approximately three hundred thousand kilometers per second and according to Einstein's famous theory of special relativity represents the absolute maximum speed at which any information or physical object can possibly travel through space.
exampleZh: 真空中的光速是一个 fundamental universal constant of nature 测量为 approximately three hundred thousand kilometers per second 根据 Einstein's famous theory of special relativity 代表任何信息或物理物体在空间中 possibly travel 的 absolute maximum speed

exampleEn: Modern astronomical observatories equipped with extremely sensitive instruments can now peer deep into the distant cosmos capturing faint light from galaxies that formed less than one billion years after the original Big Bang event that created our entire observable universe some thirteen point eight billion years ago.
exampleZh: 配备 extremely sensitive instruments 的 modern astronomical observatories 现在可以 deep into the distant cosmos 捕获来自 some thirteen point eight billion years ago 原始 Big Bang event 后 less than one billion years formed 的遥远星系的 faint light

exampleEn: When a saturated solution of salt water is allowed to evaporate slowly over several days under carefully controlled laboratory temperature and humidity conditions beautiful cubic crystal of pure sodium chloride gradually form as the dissolved ions arrange themselves into a highly ordered repeating three-dimensional geometric lattice structure.
exampleZh: 当 saturated solution of salt water 在 carefully controlled laboratory temperature and humidity conditions 下 slowly evaporate over several days 时 美丽的 cubic crystal of pure sodium chloride 逐渐形成 因为 dissolved ions arrange themselves into a highly ordered repeating three-dimensional geometric lattice structure

exampleEn: Radioactive isotope used in medical imaging procedures undergo predictable nuclear decay over time emitting detectable subatomic particles that specialized scanning equipment can track to create detailed three-dimensional diagnostic images of internal organs and detect abnormalities like cancerous tumors at very early treatable stages.
exampleZh: 用于 medical imaging procedures 的 radioactive isotope 随时间 undergo predictable nuclear decay  emitting detectable subatomic particles that specialized scanning equipment can track 以 create detailed three-dimensional diagnostic images of internal organs and detect abnormalities like cancerous tumors at very early treatable stages

exampleEn: The density of a substance defined as its mass per unit volume determines whether an object made of that material will float or sink when placed in a particular liquid such as water which has a density of exactly one gram per cubic centimeter under standard laboratory reference conditions at four degrees Celsius.
exampleZh: Substance 的 density defined as its mass per unit volume 决定了由该 material 制成的 object 放置在 particular liquid 中时是 float 还是 sink 例如 water which has a density of exactly one gram per cubic centimeter under standard laboratory reference conditions at four degrees Celsius

exampleEn: The process of diffusion causes particles to spread gradually from regions of higher concentration to regions of lower concentration through random thermal molecular motion until eventually a state of uniform equilibrium distribution has been reached throughout the entire available spatial volume of the container system.
exampleZh: diffusion 过程导致 particles 通过 random thermal molecular motion 从 higher concentration 的区域 gradually spread 到 lower concentration 的区域 直到 eventually a state of uniform equilibrium distribution has been reached throughout the entire available spatial volume of the container system

exampleEn: Chemists often need to dilute concentrated acid solutions by carefully and slowly adding precise measured volumes of the strong acid into a larger quantity of distilled water while constantly stirring the mixture to ensure even distribution and prevent dangerous localized overheating or violent splashing of corrosive liquid droplets.
exampleZh: Chemists 经常需要 dilute concentrated acid solutions 通过 carefully and slowly adding precise measured volumes of the strong acid into a larger quantity of distilled water 同时 constantly stirring the mixture 以确保 even distribution 并防止 dangerous localized overheating or violent splashing of corrosive liquid droplets

exampleEn: Biology students learn to carefully dissect preserved animal specimens such as frogs and earthworms in order to observe and identify the various internal organ systems and understand how the different anatomical structures are interconnected and arranged spatially within a living vertebrate or invertebrate body.
exampleZh: Biology students 学习 carefully dissect preserved animal specimens such as frogs and earthworms 以 observe and identify the various internal organ systems 并 understand the different anatomical structures 如何在 living vertebrate or invertebrate body 内 interconnected and arranged spatially

exampleEn: The laboratory apparatus is designed to distill the crude liquid mixture by heating it to a carefully controlled temperature at which the desired volatile organic compound vaporizes and can then be collected and condensed back into purified liquid form in a separate receiving flask positioned at the cooler end of the glass condenser column apparatus.
exampleZh: Laboratory apparatus 设计用于 distill the crude liquid mixture 通过将其加热到 carefully controlled temperature 在该温度下 desired volatile organic compound vaporizes 然后可以 collected and condensed back into purified liquid form 在 a separate receiving flask positioned at the cooler end of the glass condenser column apparatus 中

exampleEn: Rubber bands stretch when pulled because the long coiled polymer molecules that make up the rubber material are able to temporarily straighten and extend under applied tension but then immediately return to their original randomly coiled configuration once the stretching force is removed demonstrating the material property known as elastic reversible deformation behavior in response to mechanical stress.
exampleZh: 橡皮筋在被拉时 stretch 因为构成 rubber material 的 long coiled polymer molecules 在 applied tension 下能够 temporarily straighten and extend 但然后在 stretching force removed 后 immediately return 到它们 original randomly coiled configuration  demonstrated the material property known as elastic reversible deformation behavior in response to mechanical stress

exampleEn: In a standard laboratory electrochemical cell two different metal electrode are immersed in a conductive electrolyte solution and connected by an external wire allowing electrons to flow spontaneously from the more reactive metal anode to the less reactive metal cathode generating a measurable electrical potential difference and direct current flow between them.
exampleZh: 在 standard laboratory electrochemical cell 中 two different metal electrode 被 immersed in a conductive electrolyte solution 并由 external wire connected  allowing electrons to flow spontaneously from the more reactive metal anode to the less reactive metal cathode generating a measurable electrical potential difference and direct current flow between them

exampleEn: Electron microscope use beams of accelerated electron instead of visible light to create highly magnified images of extremely tiny objects such as individual virus particles and even large individual protein molecule at resolutions far beyond what any conventional optical light microscope could ever possibly achieve due to the physical limitations imposed by the wavelength of visible light itself.
exampleZh: Electron microscope 使用 beams of accelerated electron 而不是 visible light 来创建 extremely tiny objects 的 highly magnified images 例如 individual virus particles 甚至 large individual protein molecule 其 resolution far beyond 任何 conventional optical light microscope 由于 visible light 本身的 wavelength 所 imposed 的 physical limitations 而 ever possibly achieve

exampleEn: A reversible chemical reaction reaches a state of dynamic equilibrium when the rate of the forward reaction converting reactants into products becomes exactly equal to the rate of the reverse reaction converting products back into reactants resulting in no further net observable change in the concentrations of any of the chemical species present in the reaction mixture over time.
exampleZh: Reversible chemical reaction reaches a state of dynamic equilibrium 当 converting reactants into products 的 forward reaction 的 rate 变得 exactly equal to converting products back into reactants 的 reverse reaction 的 rate 时 导致 over time no further net observable change in the concentrations of any of the chemical species present in the reaction mixture

exampleEn: When liquid water is heated to its boiling point of one hundred degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure at sea level the individual water molecules gain sufficient kinetic energy to overcome the intermolecular attractive forces holding them together and begin to rapidly evaporate transforming from the liquid phase directly into invisible gaseous water vapor that rises and disperses into the surrounding ambient air above the heated container.
exampleZh: 当 liquid water 在 standard atmospheric pressure at sea level 下被加热到其 boiling point of one hundred degrees Celsius  individual water molecules 获得 sufficient kinetic energy 以 overcome 将它们 hold together 的 intermolecular attractive forces 开始 rapidly evaporate 从 liquid phase directly transform 为 invisible gaseous water vapor that rises and disperses into the surrounding ambient air above the heated container

exampleEn: The theory of biological evolution by natural selection first proposed by Charles Darwin in 1859 explains how all the diverse species of life on Earth gradually arose and diversified over hundreds of millions of years from simpler common ancestral forms through the gradual accumulation of small inherited genetic variations that conferred even slight survival or reproductive advantages in particular local environments over successive generations.
exampleZh: 1859年 Charles Darwin 首次提出的 biological evolution by natural selection 的理论解释了地球上所有 diverse species of life 如何在 hundreds of millions of years 中逐渐从 simpler common ancestral forms arise and diversified 通过 gradual accumulation of small inherited genetic variations 在 successive generations 中在 particular local environments 中 confer even slight survival or reproductive advantages

exampleEn: Magnets exert an invisible attractive or repulsive force on certain metallic objects made of iron nickel or cobalt that are located within their surrounding magnetic field region without requiring any direct physical contact between the magnet itself and the object being attracted or repelled across the intervening empty space separating them at a measurable distance apart.
exampleZh: Magnets 对位于其 surrounding magnetic field region 内的某些由 iron nickel or cobalt made 的 metallic objects exert an invisible attractive or repulsive force 而无需 magnet 本身与 being attracted or repelled across the intervening empty space separating them at a measurable distance apart 的 object 之间的 any direct physical contact

exampleEn: The controlled laboratory experiment was meticulously designed to test the researchers' novel hypothesis by systematically varying only one independent experimental variable at a time while carefully keeping all other potentially confounding environmental factors and measurement conditions strictly constant and identical across all treatment groups and control comparison groups throughout the entire lengthy duration of the multi-year scientific investigation period.
exampleZh: Controlled laboratory experiment 被 meticulously designed 以 test the researchers' novel hypothesis 通过 systematically varying only one independent experimental variable at a time 同时 carefully keeping all other potentially confounding environmental factors and measurement conditions strictly constant and identical across all treatment groups and control comparison groups throughout the entire lengthy duration of the multi-year scientific investigation period

exampleEn: Carbon fiber composite materials are exceptionally strong for their remarkably light weight and are now used extensively in aerospace engineering applications high-performance sporting equipment such as racing bicycles and modern wind turbine blades that must withstand enormous repeated mechanical stresses while rotating at high speeds in strong gusty winds for decades of continuous reliable operation.
exampleZh: Carbon fiber composite materials 相对于其 remarkably light weight 而言 exceptionally strong 现广泛用于 aerospace engineering applications high-performance sporting equipment such as racing bicycles 和 modern wind turbine blades that must withstand enormous repeated mechanical stresses 同时在 strong gusty winds 中以 high speeds rotating for decades of continuous reliable operation

exampleEn: The experimental protocol requires researchers to filter the crude reaction mixture through a fine porous membrane to remove all insoluble solid impurities and unwanted precipitate byproducts before the purified clear filtrate solution can be further analyzed using advanced spectroscopic and chromatographic analytical techniques to determine the precise chemical composition and yield of the desired product compound.
exampleZh: Experimental protocol 要求研究人员 filter the crude reaction mixture through a fine porous membrane 以在 purified clear filtrate solution can be further analyzed using advanced spectroscopic and chromatographic analytical techniques 之前 remove all insoluble solid impurities and unwanted precipitate byproducts 以 determine the precise chemical composition and yield of the desired product compound

exampleEn: Engineers constantly seek to reduce harmful friction between moving mechanical parts in engines and industrial machinery through improved lubrication systems advanced low-friction bearing designs and precisely engineered super-smooth surface finishes because excessive unwanted friction wastes enormous amounts of useful energy and causes premature mechanical wear and eventual catastrophic component failure if not properly managed and controlled over extended periods of heavy use.
exampleZh: 工程师 constantly seek to reduce harmful friction between moving mechanical parts in engines and industrial machinery 通过 improved lubrication systems advanced low-friction bearing designs and precisely engineered super-smooth surface finishes 因为 excessive unwanted friction wastes enormous amounts of useful energy and causes premature mechanical wear and eventual catastrophic component failure if not properly managed and controlled over extended periods of heavy use

exampleEn: When heated to sufficiently high temperatures in a specialized industrial electric arc furnace the mixture of powdered raw mineral ingredients will gradually soften and eventually completely fuse together into a homogeneous molten glassy mass that upon subsequent controlled cooling and solidification forms the hard durable ceramic material with the desired combination of mechanical thermal and electrical insulation properties for the intended commercial application.
exampleZh: 当在 specialized industrial electric arc furnace 中加热到 sufficiently high temperatures 时 powdered raw mineral ingredients 的混合物将 gradually soften 并 eventually completely fuse together 成为 homogeneous molten glassy mass 在随后的 controlled cooling and solidification 后形成 hard durable ceramic material 具有 intended commercial application 所需的 mechanical thermal and electrical insulation properties 的 desired combination

exampleEn: Our home Milky Way galaxy is a vast rotating spiral-shaped collection of approximately two hundred to four hundred billion individual stars plus enormous clouds of interstellar gas and cosmic dust all held together by the mutual gravitational attraction of their combined enormous total mass spread across a disk-shaped region of space measuring over one hundred thousand light-years from one edge to the opposite far side.
exampleZh: 我们的家园 Milky Way galaxy 是一个 vast rotating spiral-shaped collection of approximately two hundred to four hundred billion individual stars plus enormous clouds of interstellar gas and cosmic dust 全部由它们 combined enormous total mass 的 mutual gravitational attraction held together  spread across a disk-shaped region of space measuring over one hundred thousand light-years from one edge to the opposite far side

exampleEn: The clear viscous gel formed when the hot liquid solution of dissolved gelatin protein molecules was allowed to cool slowly to room temperature over several hours demonstrating the reversible physical process of thermo-responsive sol-gel phase transition behavior that is characteristic of many natural and synthetic polymer materials under appropriate thermal and chemical environmental stimulus conditions.
exampleZh: 当 dissolved gelatin protein molecules 的 hot liquid solution 在 over several hours 里 slowly cool to room temperature 时 形成了 clear viscous gel  demonstrated the reversible physical process of thermo-responsive sol-gel phase transition behavior that is characteristic of many natural and synthetic polymer materials under appropriate thermal and chemical environmental stimulus conditions

exampleEn: An electrical generator works on the fundamental physical principle of electromagnetic induction discovered by Michael Faraday in 1831 converting useful rotational mechanical energy derived from spinning steam turbines or falling water into clean electrical power that can be efficiently transmitted through high-voltage cables over enormous distances to homes factories schools and businesses across entire continents and regions.
exampleZh: Electrical generator 根据 Michael Faraday 在1831年发现的 electromagnetic induction 的 fundamental physical principle 工作 将 spinning steam turbines or falling water derived 的 useful rotational mechanical energy convert 为 clean electrical power 可以通过 high-voltage cables efficiently transmitted over enormous distances 到 homes factories schools and businesses across entire continents and regions

exampleEn: The successful completion of the ambitious international Human Genome Project in 2003 after thirteen years of intensive collaborative research involving thousands of scientists across multiple countries produced the first complete map of all the approximately three billion chemical base pairs that make up the entire set of human genetic instructions carried within the nucleus of every nucleated cell in our bodies.
exampleZh: 经过涉及 multiple countries 数千名科学家的 thirteen years of intensive collaborative research  ambitious international Human genome Project 在2003年 successful completion 产生了第一份 complete map of all the approximately three billion chemical base pairs that make up the entire set of human genetic instructions carried within the nucleus of every nucleated cell in our bodies

exampleEn: The force of gravity between any two objects in the universe is directly proportional to the product of their individual masses and inversely proportional to the square of the distance separating their respective centers according to Isaac Newton's elegant universal law of gravitation first published in his monumental scientific work the Principia Mathematica in the year 1687 at the dawn of the modern scientific revolution in physics.
exampleZh: 根据 Isaac Newton 于1687年在他的 monumental scientific work the Principia Mathematica 中首次发表的 elegant universal law of gravitation  the force of gravity between any two objects in the universe is directly proportional to the product of their individual masses and inversely proportional to the square of the distance separating their respective centers

exampleEn: Helium is the second lightest and second most abundant chemical element in the entire observable universe after hydrogen yet it is relatively rare on Earth because being an extremely light chemically inert noble gas it can readily escape our planet's gravitational pull and drift away into the vacuum of outer space over geological timescales spanning millions of years since the original formation of our solar system.
exampleZh: helium 是整个 observable universe 中 second lightest 且 second most abundant 的 chemical element 仅次于 hydrogen 但它在地球上 relatively rare 因为作为 extremely light chemically inert noble gas 它可以 readily escape 我们 planet's gravitational pull and drift away into the vacuum of outer space over geological timescales spanning millions of years since the original formation of our solar system

exampleEn: Identical twins develop from a single fertilized egg that splits into two separate embryos during the very earliest stages of embryonic development and therefore share virtually one hundred percent of their inherited genetic material making them natural clones of each other and uniquely valuable subjects for scientific research studies designed to disentangle the complex interacting influences of genetic inheritance versus environmental upbringing on human development behavior and disease susceptibility.
exampleZh: identical twins 从 a single fertilized egg that splits into two separate embryos during the very earliest stages of embryonic development 发育而来 因此 share virtually one hundred percent of their inherited genetic material 使它们成为彼此的 natural clones 和 uniquely valuable subjects for scientific research studies designed to disentangle the complex interacting influences of genetic inheritance versus environmental upbringing on human development behavior and disease susceptibility

exampleEn: A single tiny spark of static electricity generated by friction between two insulating surfaces can sometimes be sufficient to ignite highly flammable vapors of volatile organic solvents such as gasoline or acetone that may have accidentally accumulated in poorly ventilated laboratory workspaces creating a potentially catastrophic fire or even a violent explosion hazard if adequate safety precautions are not strictly followed at all times by all laboratory personnel present.
exampleZh: 由 two insulating surfaces 之间的 friction generated 的 a single tiny spark of static electricity 有时可能足以 ignite 高度 flammable 的 volatile organic solvents such as gasoline or acetone 的 vapors 这些 vapors 可能 accidentally accumulated 在 poorly ventilated laboratory workspaces 中 如果 adequate safety precautions are not strictly followed at all times by all laboratory personnel present 则 creating a potentially catastrophic fire or even a violent explosion hazard

exampleEn: Infrared thermal imaging cameras can detect minute differences in the surface temperature of objects and living bodies from a safe distance and are used extensively in applications as diverse as building energy efficiency inspections medical diagnostic screening for inflammation and fever and night vision equipment for military and law enforcement surveillance operations conducted under conditions of total darkness where visible light is completely absent and unavailable.
exampleZh: infrared thermal imaging cameras 可以从 safe distance detect minute differences in the surface temperature of objects and living bodies 并广泛用于 applications as diverse as building energy efficiency inspections medical diagnostic screening for inflammation and fever and night vision equipment for military and law enforcement surveillance operations conducted under conditions of total darkness where visible light is completely absent and unavailable

exampleEn: Children inherit approximately half of their total genetic material from each biological parent through the process of sexual reproduction which randomly shuffles and recombines the parental DNA sequences during the formation of specialized egg and sperm reproductive cells ensuring that each offspring receives a unique and never-before-seen combination of inherited genetic variants and traits from both sides of their ancestral family lineage.
exampleZh: Children 通过 sexual reproduction 的过程 inherit approximately half of their total genetic material from each biological parent 该过程在 specialized egg and sperm reproductive cells 的 formation 过程中 randomly shuffles and recombines the parental DNA sequences 确保每个 offspring receives a unique and never-before-seen combination of inherited genetic variants and traits from both sides of their ancestral family lineage

exampleEn: When common table salt dissolves in water the ionic bonds holding the sodium and chloride ion together in the solid crystal lattice structure are broken by the polar water molecules and the individual positively charged sodium cations and negatively charged chloride anions become separated from each other and surrounded by shells of tightly bound water molecules existing as freely moving independent hydrated ion dispersed throughout the entire volume of the resulting clear saline aqueous solution.
exampleZh: 当普通食盐 dissolve in water 时 在 solid crystal lattice structure 中 holding the sodium and chloride ion together 的 ionic bonds 被 polar water molecules broken  individual positively charged sodium cations 和 negatively charged chloride anions 变得 separated from each other 并被 tightly bound water molecules 的 shells surrounded  existing as freely moving independent hydrated ion dispersed throughout the entire volume of the resulting clear saline aqueous solution
