exampleEn: The brave war reporter risked her own life on a daily basis to document the devastating human cost of the brutal armed conflict bringing the stark reality of civilian suffering on the front lines directly into the living rooms of millions of concerned viewers around the world each evening.
exampleZh: 勇敢的 war reporter 每天 risked her own life 以 document the devastating human cost of the brutal armed conflict 将前线 civilian suffering 的 stark reality directly bringing into the living rooms of millions of concerned viewers around the world each evening

exampleEn: The young journalist's remarkable investigative scoop exposing widespread corruption at the highest levels of government earned her both a prestigious national journalism award and the lasting respect and admiration of her professional peers throughout the entire global news industry community.
exampleZh: 这位年轻 journalist 的 remarkable investigative scoop exposing widespread corruption at the highest levels of government 为她赢得了 prestigious national journalism award 以及 entire global news industry community 中 her professional peers 的 lasting respect and admiration

exampleEn: The actor spent countless hours meticulously studying the detailed shooting script and practicing her most emotionally demanding lines alone in her apartment mirror before arriving on set fully prepared to deliver a powerfully moving and critically acclaimed performance that would eventually earn her a major international film award nomination.
exampleZh: Actor spent countless hours meticulously studying the detailed shooting script and practicing her most emotionally demanding lines alone in her apartment mirror 在 arriving on set fully prepared to deliver a powerfully moving and critically acclaimed performance that would eventually earn her a major international film award nomination 之前

exampleEn: The campaign's simple but emotionally powerful slogan resonated deeply with millions of disillusioned voters who felt ignored by the political establishment and desperately wanted a leader who would finally listen to their concerns and fight tirelessly for meaningful and lasting positive change in their everyday lives.
exampleZh: Campaign's simple but emotionally powerful slogan resonated deeply with millions of disillusioned voters who felt ignored by the political establishment and desperately wanted a leader who would finally listen to their concerns and fight tirelessly for meaningful and lasting positive change in their everyday lives

exampleEn: Professional journalists are ethically obligated to protect the confidentiality of their sensitive news source even when facing intense legal pressure or the threat of imprisonment for refusing to reveal the identity of a whistleblower who provided crucial information about serious government wrongdoing to the press.
exampleZh: Professional journalists 在 ethically obligated to protect the confidentiality of their sensitive news source 即使面对 intense legal pressure or the threat of imprisonment for refusing to reveal the identity of a whistleblower who provided crucial information about serious government wrongdoing to the press 时也是如此

exampleEn: The company's official spokesperson read a carefully worded prepared statement to the assembled reporters acknowledging that a serious technical error had occurred but firmly denying any allegations that senior management had deliberately attempted to conceal or cover up the embarrassing incident from regulators or the investing public.
exampleZh: 公司 official spokesperson 向 assembled reporters read a carefully worded prepared statement acknowledging that a serious technical error had occurred 但 firmly denying any allegations that senior management had deliberately attempted to conceal or cover up the embarrassing incident from regulators or the investing public

exampleEn: The live television broadcast from the network's largest production studio required the coordinated efforts of over one hundred and fifty skilled technical crew members working seamlessly together behind the scenes to ensure that every camera angle lighting cue and sound effect was executed perfectly on schedule throughout the complicated ninety-minute show.
exampleZh: Network's largest production studio 的 live television broadcast 需要 over one hundred and fifty skilled technical crew members 的 coordinated efforts 在幕后 seamlessly working together 以确保每个 camera angle lighting cue and sound effect 在复杂的九十分钟 show 中按计划 perfectly executed

exampleEn: Many quality news organizations have successfully shifted their business model away from relying primarily on declining print advertising revenue toward building a sustainable base of loyal paying digital subscription customers who value and are willing to directly financially support independent professional journalism.
exampleZh: 许多 quality news organizations 已 successfully shifted their business model away from relying primarily on declining print advertising revenue toward building a sustainable base of loyal paying digital subscription customers who value and are willing to directly financially support independent professional journalism

exampleEn: The sensational tabloid headlines screamed about the latest celebrity scandals love affairs and bitter public divorces from every newsstand and supermarket checkout counter across the entire country competing fiercely for the fleeting attention and spare change of impulse-driven casual readers passing by.
exampleZh: Sensational tabloid headlines screamed about the latest celebrity scandals love affairs and bitter public divorces from every newsstand and supermarket checkout counter across the entire country competing fiercely for the fleeting attention and spare change of impulse-driven casual readers passing by

exampleEn: The live global telecast of the Olympic Games opening ceremony reached an estimated worldwide audience of over one and a half billion people making it one of the most widely watched single television events in the entire recorded history of human broadcast communications since the invention of the medium.
exampleZh: Olympic Games opening ceremony 的 live global telecast 达到了 estimated worldwide audience of over one and a half billion people 使其成为自该 medium invention 以来 entire recorded history of human broadcast communications 中 most widely watched single television events 之一

exampleEn: Despite the explosive growth of online video streaming platforms and social media content in recent years traditional television still remains the single most trusted and influential source of news and information for the majority of the population particularly among older demographic age groups in most developed countries around the world today.
exampleZh: 尽管 online video streaming platforms and social media content 近年来 explosive growth  traditional television 仍然仍然是 most trusted and influential source of news and information for the majority of the population 特别是 among older demographic age groups in most developed countries around the world today

exampleEn: Professional interpreters must be able to accurately and fluently translate complex spoken language in real time during high-stakes diplomatic negotiations where even a single subtle mistranslation of a crucial word or phrase could potentially have serious unforeseen political and international consequences for all parties involved.
exampleZh: Professional interpreters 必须能够在 high-stakes diplomatic negotiations 中 accurately and fluently translate complex spoken language in real time 在这种谈判中即使是 a crucial word or phrase 的 single subtle mistranslation 也可能 potentially have serious unforeseen political and international consequences for all parties involved

exampleEn: The controversial video clip began trending on social media within minutes of being posted online and by the following morning had already accumulated over fifty million views and millions of comments shares and reactions from users spread across every continent on the planet literally overnight.
exampleZh: Controversial video clip began trending on social media within minutes of being posted online 到第二天早上已经 accumulated over fifty million views and millions of comments shares and reactions from users spread across every continent on the planet literally overnight

exampleEn: The politician's controversial late-night tweet sparked an immediate and intense public backlash with thousands of outraged social media users calling for a formal public apology and demanding her resignation from elected office within hours of the original offending message first appearing online for all the world to see.
exampleZh: Politician's controversial late-night tweet sparked an immediate and intense public backlash with thousands of outraged social media users calling for a formal public apology and demanding her resignation from elected office within hours of the original offending message first appearing online for all the world to see

exampleEn: Short-form vertical video content lasting less than sixty seconds has become the dominant format for social media entertainment and advertising among younger users who increasingly prefer brief snackable clips over the longer traditional horizontal video formats favored by older generations of viewers.
exampleZh: Short-form vertical video content lasting less than sixty seconds 已成为 younger users 中 social media entertainment and advertising 的 dominant format 他们 increasingly prefer brief snackable clips over the longer traditional horizontal video formats favored by older generations of viewers

exampleEn: Streaming services now collect enormous amounts of detailed behavioral data on what each individual viewer watches searches for and skips past enabling the platforms' powerful recommendation algorithms to serve up an endlessly personalized stream of suggested content designed to maximize user engagement and retention time on their service.
exampleZh: Streaming services 现在 collect enormous amounts of detailed behavioral data on what each individual viewer watches searches for and skips past enabling the platforms' powerful recommendation algorithms to serve up an endlessly personalized stream of suggested content designed to maximize user engagement and retention time on their service

exampleEn: The heartwarming video of the young boy reuniting with his military father after a year-long overseas deployment went viral almost instantly accumulating over one hundred million views across multiple social media platforms within just the first forty-eight hours after its initial upload to the internet.
exampleZh: 年轻男孩与 year-long overseas deployment 后归来的军人父亲 reuniting 的 heartwarming video went viral almost instantly 在 initial upload to the internet 后的仅仅 first forty-eight hours 内就在多个 social media platforms 上 accumulated over one hundred million views

exampleEn: Independent media watchdog organizations play a crucial role in monitoring and publicly reporting on press freedom violations around the world and advocating for the protection of journalists who risk their personal safety and liberty to report the truth from some of the most dangerous and repressive places on the entire planet.
exampleZh: Independent media watchdog organizations 在 monitoring and publicly reporting on press freedom violations around the world 以及 advocating for the protection of journalists who risk their personal safety and liberty to report the truth from some of the most dangerous and repressive places on the entire planet 方面 play a crucial role

exampleEn: The breaking news alert moved across the international wire services within seconds of the dramatic event occurring ensuring that newsrooms and media organizations in every corner of the globe received the urgent bulletin almost simultaneously regardless of their geographic location or local time zone differences relative to where the original story was unfolding in real time.
exampleZh: Breaking news alert moved across the international wire services within seconds of the dramatic event occurring ensuring that newsrooms and media organizations in every corner of the globe received the urgent bulletin almost simultaneously regardless of their geographic location or local time zone differences relative to where the original story was unfolding in real time

exampleEn: The government voted overwhelmingly to abolish the outdated colonial-era law that had restricted freedom of assembly for over a century without any real legitimate justification in modern democratic society.
exampleZh: 政府以压倒性多数投票决定 abolish 那项限制集会自由的过时殖民时代法律 该 law 在 modern democratic society 中已没有任何 real legitimate justification 却存在了一个多世纪

exampleEn: The prosecutor decided to formally accuse the former minister of accepting substantial illegal bribes in exchange for granting lucrative government construction contracts to several favored private companies over a period of five years.
exampleZh: 检察官决定 formally accuse the former minister of accepting substantial illegal bribes in exchange for granting lucrative government construction contracts to several favored private companies over a period of five years

exampleEn: After three weeks of dramatic and closely watched courtroom testimony the jury deliberated for less than four hours before returning to acquit the defendant of all charges citing insufficient credible evidence presented by the prosecution during the trial.
exampleZh: 经过三周戏剧性且备受关注的 courtroom testimony 陪审团 deliberated for less than four hours 然后返回 acquit 被告所有指控 citing insufficient credible evidence presented by the prosecution during the trial

exampleEn: The witness signed a sworn legal affidavit attesting that she had personally seen the accused individual at the scene of the crime on the exact evening and approximate time when the alleged incident was reported to have taken place according to police records.
exampleZh: Witness signed a sworn legal affidavit attesting that she had personally seen the accused individual at the scene of the crime on the exact evening and approximate time when the alleged incident was reported to have taken place according to police records

exampleEn: The convicted defendant's legal team immediately filed an urgent appeal against both the guilty verdict and the length of the prison sentence arguing that several critical pieces of exculpatory evidence had been improperly excluded from consideration during the original trial proceedings.
exampleZh: Convicted defendant's legal team immediately filed an urgent appeal against both the guilty verdict and the length of the prison sentence  arguing that several critical pieces of exculpatory evidence had been improperly excluded from consideration during the original trial proceedings

exampleEn: The two parties agreed to resolve their costly and time-consuming commercial contract dispute through binding arbitration rather than pursuing lengthy and unpredictable litigation through the already severely overburdened and backlogged public court system.
exampleZh: 双方同意通过 binding arbitration 解决他们 costly and time-consuming commercial contract dispute 而不是通过 already severely overburdened and backlogged public court system 进行 lengthy and unpredictable litigation

exampleEn: The defense attorney delivered an impassioned and brilliantly argued closing statement to the jury that reportedly moved several of the seated jurors to tears and raised serious doubts about the reliability of the prosecution's key eyewitness testimony in the highly publicized trial.
exampleZh: Defense attorney 向陪审团 delivered an impassioned and brilliantly argued closing statement  reportedly moved several of the seated jurors to tears 并 raised serious doubts about the reliability of the prosecution's key eyewitness testimony in the highly publicized trial

exampleEn: The judge set bail at two million dollars citing the seriousness of the alleged crimes and expressing concern that the wealthy defendant with significant overseas assets and multiple foreign passports posed a substantial flight risk if released from custody before his scheduled trial date.
exampleZh: Judge set bail at two million dollars citing the seriousness of the alleged crimes and expressing concern that the wealthy defendant with significant overseas assets and multiple foreign passports posed a substantial flight risk if released from custody before his scheduled trial date

exampleEn: Every eligible citizen has both the precious democratic right and the solemn civic responsibility to cast their ballot in free and fair elections and thereby participate directly in choosing who will represent their interests and values in the halls of government power.
exampleZh: 每个 eligible citizen 都有 precious democratic right 和 solemn civic responsibility cast their ballot in free and fair elections 并 thereby participate directly in choosing who will represent their interests and values in the halls of government power

exampleEn: The prime minister announced a major reshuffle of her senior cabinet team in response to the disappointing results of the recent general election moving several underperforming ministers to less high-profile departments and promoting a new generation of younger talented politicians into key leadership positions.
exampleZh: Prime minister announced a major reshuffle of her senior cabinet team in response to the disappointing results of the recent general election moving several underperforming ministers to less high-profile departments and promoting a new generation of younger talented politicians into key leadership positions

exampleEn: Each presidential candidate participated in three nationally televised debates during the final month of the closely contested election campaign answering tough questions on domestic policy foreign affairs and their personal vision for the country's future direction and priorities over the next five years.
exampleZh: 每位 presidential candidate 在 closely contested election campaign 的最后一个月参加了三场全国电视辩论 回答了关于 domestic policy foreign affairs and their personal vision for the country's future direction and priorities over the next five years 的 tough questions

exampleEn: Members of the parliamentary caucus met behind closed doors for several hours of intense and sometimes heated private discussion before eventually emerging to announce that they had reached a fragile internal compromise on the controversial proposed legislation after weeks of bitter public disagreement.
exampleZh: Parliamentary caucus 的成员举行了几个小时的闭门 intense and sometimes heated private discussion 然后 eventually emerging to announce that they had reached a fragile internal compromise on the controversial proposed legislation after weeks of bitter public disagreement

exampleEn: The United Nations Charter signed in 1945 by fifty-one founding member states established the fundamental principles of modern international law and collective security cooperation that continue to guide and shape diplomatic relations between sovereign nations across the globe to this very day.
exampleZh: 1945年由五十一个创始成员国签署的 United Nations charter 确立了 modern international law and collective security cooperation 的 fundamental principles 这些 principles continue to guide and shape diplomatic relations between sovereign nations across the globe to this very day

exampleEn: The controversial clause buried deep within the hundreds of pages of the complex trade agreement would allow foreign corporations to sue national governments in secretive private international tribunals for any lost future profits resulting from new environmental or public health protection regulations being introduced.
exampleZh: Complex trade agreement 数百页中 buried deep 的 controversial clause 将允许 foreign corporations 在 secretive private international tribunals 中就因 new environmental or public health protection regulations being introduced 而导致的 any lost future profits 起诉 national governments

exampleEn: Human rights organizations from around the world launched an urgent global campaign calling on the president to grant executive clemency to the imprisoned journalist who they argued had been wrongly convicted on politically motivated charges designed solely to silence her independent reporting and punish her criticism of powerful government officials.
exampleZh: 世界各地的 Human rights organizations 发起了一场 urgent global campaign 呼吁总统 grant executive clemency 给那位被监禁的 journalist 他们认为她因 politically motivated charges 被 wrongly convicted 这些 charges designed solely to silence her independent reporting and punish her criticism of powerful government officials

exampleEn: The consumer protection agency received over five thousand formal written complaint from outraged citizens about the company's deceptive advertising practices and its persistent refusal to honor the clearly stated money-back guarantee on its heavily promoted but apparently defective and ineffective health supplement products.
exampleZh: Consumer protection agency received over five thousand formal written complaint from outraged citizens about the company's deceptive advertising practices and its persistent refusal to honor the clearly stated money-back guarantee on its heavily promoted but apparently defective and ineffective health supplement products

exampleEn: The bill must secure the approval of both houses of congress and receive the formal signature of the president before it can officially become the law of the land and take full legal effect across all fifty states and territories of the federal republic simultaneously.
exampleZh: 该 bill 必须获得 both houses of congress 的 approval 并 receive the formal signature of the president 然后才能 officially become the law of the land 并在联邦共和国的所有五十个州和领土上 simultaneously take full legal effect

exampleEn: The elected representative spends every Friday meeting personally with individual constituent from her home district listening carefully to their various concerns complaints and suggestions about local issues ranging from inadequate public transportation services to the poor condition of neighborhood roads and public school facilities.
exampleZh: Elected representative 每周五花时间与来自其 home district 的 individual constituent 亲自 meeting  carefully listening to their various concerns complaints and suggestions about local issues 从 inadequate public transportation services 到 neighborhood roads and public school facilities 的 poor condition

exampleEn: The national constitution guarantees certain fundamental individual rights and civil liberties to every citizen regardless of their ethnic background religious beliefs or personal political opinions and these essential constitutional protections cannot be suspended or revoked by the ordinary legislative action of any temporary political majority in parliament.
exampleZh: National constitution guarantees certain fundamental individual rights and civil liberties 给 every citizen regardless of their ethnic background religious beliefs or personal political opinions 而这些 essential constitutional protections cannot be suspended or revoked by the ordinary legislative action of any temporary political majority in parliament

exampleEn: The judge warned the disruptive courtroom spectator that any further emotional outbursts or verbal interruptions of the ongoing legal proceedings would result in an immediate finding of criminal contempt of court and a significant fine or possibly even a short period of immediate imprisonment in the county jail facility.
exampleZh: Judge warned the disruptive courtroom spectator that any further emotional outbursts or verbal interruptions of the ongoing legal proceedings would result in an immediate finding of criminal contempt of court 以及 significant fine or possibly even a short period of immediate imprisonment in the county jail facility

exampleEn: The jury took less than three hours of deliberation to unanimously convict the defendant on all twelve counts of financial fraud and money laundering after being presented with overwhelming documentary evidence and compelling expert testimony from forensic accountants during the six-week long criminal trial proceedings.
exampleZh: Jury took less than three hours of deliberation to unanimously convict the defendant on all twelve counts of financial fraud and money laundering after being presented with overwhelming documentary evidence and compelling expert testimony from forensic accountants during the six-week long criminal trial proceedings

exampleEn: The Supreme Court unanimously ruled that the government's controversial policy of indefinitely detaining foreign nationals without charge or trial violated both the national constitution and the country's binding legal obligations under several major international human rights treaties and conventions to which it was a long-standing signatory state party.
exampleZh: Supreme court unanimously ruled that the government's controversial policy of indefinitely detaining foreign nationals without charge or trial violated both the national constitution and the country's binding legal obligations under several major international human rights treaties and conventions to which it was a long-standing signatory state party

exampleEn: White-collar financial crime such as large-scale corporate fraud and systematic insider trading causes far greater total economic damage to society each year than all forms of street-level property crime combined yet typically receives far less attention from law enforcement and results in much lighter average prison sentences for convicted offenders.
exampleZh: White-collar financial crime such as large-scale corporate fraud and systematic insider trading 每年对社会造成的 total economic damage 远远大于所有形式的 street-level property crime combined 然而通常 receives far less attention from law enforcement 并 results in much lighter average prison sentences for convicted offenders

exampleEn: The suspect was taken into police custody for questioning late yesterday evening and can legally be held for up to ninety-six hours before the investigating officers must either formally charge him with a specific criminal offense or release him unconditionally from detention without any further delay whatsoever.
exampleZh: Suspect 在昨晚 late yesterday evening was taken into police custody for questioning 并且 can legally be held for up to ninety-six hours 然后 investigating officers 必须 either formally charge him with a specific criminal offense 或者 unconditionally release him from detention without any further delay whatsoever

exampleEn: The president issued an emergency executive decree temporarily banning all public gatherings of more than ten people in response to the rapidly escalating public health crisis that was threatening to completely overwhelm the country's already severely stretched hospital capacity and critical care medical infrastructure within a matter of just a few short days.
exampleZh: 总统 issued an emergency executive decree temporarily banning all public gatherings of more than ten people in response to the rapidly escalating public health crisis that was threatening to completely overwhelm the country's already severely stretched hospital capacity and critical care medical infrastructure within a matter of just a few short days

exampleEn: Under the fundamental legal principle of presumed innocence until proven guilty beyond any reasonable doubt every criminal defendant is entitled to a fair and impartial trial conducted according to the established rules of criminal procedure and the constitutional guarantees of due process of law regardless of the nature or severity of the alleged offense.
exampleZh: 根据在被证明有罪之前 presumed innocence 的 fundamental legal principle 无论 alleged offense 的 nature or severity 如何 每个 criminal defendant 都 entitled to a fair and impartial trial conducted according to the established rules of criminal procedure and the constitutional guarantees of due process of law

exampleEn: The primary defense strategy argued by the defendant's skilled legal team was that their client had acted entirely in reasonable self-defense when confronted by an armed and clearly aggressive intruder who had unlawfully broken into the family home in the middle of the dark and frightening night without any warning whatsoever.
exampleZh: Defendant's skilled legal team 所 argued 的 primary defense strategy 是他们的 client 在面对一名 armed and clearly aggressive intruder who had unlawfully broken into the family home in the middle of the dark and frightening night without any warning whatsoever 时 had acted entirely in reasonable self-defense

exampleEn: Each member state sends a senior diplomatic delegate to the annual sessions of the United Nations General Assembly to participate in high-level discussions and formal votes on critical issues of pressing international concern including global security challenges climate change response coordination and sustainable development financing for the world's poorest and most vulnerable developing nations.
exampleZh: 每个 member state 派遣一名 senior diplomatic delegate 参加 United Nations General Assembly 的年度会议 参与关于 critical issues of pressing international concern 的高层讨论和正式投票 包括 global security challenges climate change response coordination and sustainable development financing for the world's poorest and most vulnerable developing nations

exampleEn: A healthy functioning democracy requires not only free and fair elections at regular constitutionally mandated intervals but also an independent judiciary a free press that can investigate and criticize those in power without fear of retaliation and a vibrant civil society of active citizens engaged in the political life of their communities and nation.
exampleZh: 一个 healthy functioning democracy 不仅需要定期在 constitutionally mandated intervals 举行 free and fair elections 还需要一个 independent judiciary 一个可以 investigate and criticize those in power without fear of retaliation 的 free press 以及一个由 active citizens engaged in the political life of their communities and nation 组成的 vibrant civil society

exampleEn: The revolutionary council voted almost unanimously to depose the longtime authoritarian leader who had ruled the impoverished nation with an iron grip of fear and ruthless suppression of all political opposition for over three decades of corrupt and brutal dictatorial governance.
exampleZh: Revolutionary council 以 almost unanimously voted to depose 那位统治了这个 impoverished nation 超过三十年的 longtime authoritarian leader 他以 fear 的 iron grip 和 ruthless suppression of all political opposition 进行着 corrupt and brutal dictatorial governance

exampleEn: The brutal military dictator seized power in a violent coup that overthrew the country's fragile democratically elected civilian government and immediately imposed strict martial law across the entire nation suspending all constitutional rights and brutally suppressing any hint of peaceful political dissent or organized opposition to his newly installed illegitimate ruling regime.
exampleZh: Brutal military dictator 在一场 violent coup 中 seized power 推翻了该国 fragile democratically elected civilian government 并在全国立即 imposed strict martial law 暂停所有 constitutional rights 并 brutally suppressing any hint of peaceful political dissent or organized opposition to his newly installed illegitimate ruling regime

exampleEn: Experienced career diplomat spent months of painstaking effort carefully negotiating the highly sensitive terms of the complex prisoner exchange agreement between the two hostile governments whose official representatives had refused to meet face to face or even communicate directly with one another through normal established diplomatic channels for over five years.
exampleZh: Experienced career diplomat spent months of painstaking effort carefully negotiating the highly sensitive terms of the complex prisoner exchange agreement between the two hostile governments whose official representatives had refused to meet face to face or even communicate directly with one another through normal established diplomatic channels for over five years

exampleEn: Every four years citizens across the country go to the polls to elect their local representatives to the national parliament in a fiercely competitive democratic contest that will ultimately determine which political party or coalition of allied parties will form the next government and set the policy direction of the country for the following term.
exampleZh: 每四年全国各地的 citizens 前往 polls elect 其当地 representatives 到 national parliament 在一场 fiercely competitive democratic contest 中 该 contest 将 ultimately determine which political party or coalition of allied parties 将 form the next government 并 set the policy direction of the country for the following term

exampleEn: The ambassador ordered the temporary evacuation of all non-essential diplomatic personnel and their dependent family members from the embassy compound as the security situation in the host country's capital city rapidly deteriorated following the sudden outbreak of intense armed clashes between rival political factions in the streets immediately outside the fortified diplomatic perimeter walls.
exampleZh: Ambassador ordered the temporary evacuation of all non-essential diplomatic personnel and their dependent family members from the embassy compound 因为 host country's capital city 的安全局势在 rival political factions 之间在 fortified diplomatic perimeter walls 外街道上的 sudden outbreak of intense armed clashes 之后 rapidly deteriorated

exampleEn: The parliament is expected to enact the comprehensive new environmental protection legislation by the end of the current legislative session following months of intense political debate and negotiation between the government and opposition parties over the specific details scope and enforcement mechanisms of the various complex regulatory provisions contained within the lengthy and technically detailed bill.
exampleZh: Parliament 预计在 current legislative session 结束前 enact the comprehensive new environmental protection legislation 在此之前经过了 months of intense political debate and negotiation between the government and opposition parties over the specific details scope and enforcement mechanisms of the various complex regulatory provisions contained within the lengthy and technically detailed bill

exampleEn: The court ruled that the accused individual could be legally extradited to face trial in the requesting country provided that the government first obtained binding diplomatic assurances that the death penalty would not be sought imposed or carried out in his specific individual case under any possible circumstances or eventual outcome of the legal proceedings against him.
exampleZh: Court ruled that the accused individual could be legally extradited to face trial in the requesting country provided that the government first obtained binding diplomatic assurances that the death penalty would not be sought imposed or carried out in his specific individual case under any possible circumstances or eventual outcome of the legal proceedings against him

exampleEn: In most legal jurisdictions a felony is defined as any serious criminal offense that is punishable by a minimum of one full year of imprisonment in a state or federal correctional facility and conviction for such a grave offense typically also results in the permanent loss of certain important civil rights including the right to vote in elections and the right to serve on a criminal trial jury.
exampleZh: 在大多数 legal jurisdictions 中 felony 被定义为任何 serious criminal offense 可被判处至少一年在 state or federal correctional facility 中的 imprisonment 而对此类 grave offense 的 conviction 通常还会导致某些重要 civil rights 的 permanent loss 包括在 elections 中 voting 的权利和在 criminal trial jury 中 serving 的权利

exampleEn: The sophisticated investment fraud scheme operated undetected for nearly a decade and ultimately defrauded thousands of elderly and vulnerable retired investors out of their entire life savings totaling more than three billion dollars before being uncovered and shut down by federal investigators and financial regulators.
exampleZh: Sophisticated investment fraud scheme 在 nearly a decade 里 operated undetected 并 ultimately defrauded thousands of elderly and vulnerable retired investors out of their entire life savings totaling more than three billion dollars 然后才被 federal investigators and financial regulators uncovered and shut down

exampleEn: The Senate committee scheduled a public oversight hearing to question senior military officials about the troubling reports of significant cost overruns and extensive unexplained delays in the development and testing of the new multibillion-dollar advanced defense weapons system originally scheduled for deployment over three years ago.
exampleZh: Senate committee scheduled a public oversight hearing to question senior military officials about the troubling reports of significant cost overruns and extensive unexplained delays in the development and testing of the new multibillion-dollar advanced defense weapons system originally scheduled for deployment over three years ago

exampleEn: Police detectives from the specialized homicide investigation unit worked through the night examining the carefully secured crime scene for any tiny piece of overlooked physical evidence that might help them identify and eventually track down the unknown perpetrator of the violent and apparently motiveless killing of the reclusive elderly widow in her own home.
exampleZh: Specialized homicide investigation unit 的 Police detectives worked through the night examining the carefully secured crime scene for any tiny piece of overlooked physical evidence that might help them identify and eventually track down the unknown perpetrator of the violent and apparently motiveless killing of the reclusive elderly widow in her own home

exampleEn: The government launched a major nationwide crackdown on illegal logging operations that were causing extensive and potentially irreversible environmental damage to the country's last remaining tracts of ecologically precious old-growth tropical rainforest and the unique endangered wildlife species that depend on that rapidly disappearing natural habitat for their continued survival.
exampleZh: Government launched a major nationwide crackdown on illegal logging operations that were causing extensive and potentially irreversible environmental damage to the country's last remaining tracts of ecologically precious old-growth tropical rainforest and the unique endangered wildlife species that depend on that rapidly disappearing natural habitat for their continued survival

exampleEn: The opposition party introduced a formal motion in parliament to impeach the president on serious charges of gross abuse of presidential power and deliberate obstruction of an official criminal investigation into his personal business and financial affairs including allegations of receiving undisclosed payments from foreign government sources.
exampleZh: Opposition party introduced a formal motion in parliament to impeach the president on serious charges of gross abuse of presidential power and deliberate obstruction of an official criminal investigation into his personal business and financial affairs including allegations of receiving undisclosed payments from foreign government sources

exampleEn: The federal grand jury decided to indict the prominent businessman on seventeen separate criminal counts including conspiracy to commit wire fraud money laundering and making false statements to federal investigating agents during the course of their lengthy and comprehensive probe into his complex network of offshore corporate shell companies and secret undeclared overseas bank accounts.
exampleZh: Federal grand jury decided to indict the prominent businessman on seventeen separate criminal counts including conspiracy to commit wire fraud money laundering and making false statements to federal investigating agents during the course of their lengthy and comprehensive probe into his complex network of offshore corporate shell companies and secret undeclared overseas bank accounts

exampleEn: The prison rehabilitation program aims to provide willing inmate with practical vocational skills and basic educational qualifications that will genuinely improve their realistic chances of finding stable lawful employment and successfully reintegrating back into civil society as productive law-abiding citizens following their eventual scheduled release from the correctional facility.
exampleZh: Prison rehabilitation program 旨在为 willing inmate 提供 practical vocational skills and basic educational qualifications 这将 genuinely improve their realistic chances of finding stable lawful employment and successfully reintegrating back into civil society as productive law-abiding citizens following their eventual scheduled release from the correctional facility

exampleEn: The presiding judge reminded the jury members of their solemn legal duty to carefully and impartially weigh all of the evidence that had been properly presented during the trial according to the court's specific legal instructions before reaching their final unanimous verdict on each of the individual criminal charges facing the accused defendant.
exampleZh: Presiding judge reminded the jury members of their solemn legal duty to carefully and impartially weigh all of the evidence that had been properly presented during the trial according to the court's specific legal instructions before reaching their final unanimous verdict on each of the individual criminal charges facing the accused defendant

exampleEn: The twelve members of the jury representing a diverse cross-section of the local community were sequestered in a hotel for eight days without access to news or outside communication while they carefully deliberated the complex evidence and ultimately reached their difficult unanimous decision on each of the serious criminal charges against the defendant.
exampleZh: jury 的十二名成员 representing a diverse cross-section of the local community 被 sequestered in a hotel for eight days without access to news or outside communication 同时 carefully deliberated the complex evidence 并 ultimately reached their difficult unanimous decision on each of the serious criminal charges against the defendant

exampleEn: Access to affordable legal representation is a fundamental component of any fair and effective justice system because without it ordinary citizens of modest financial means cannot practically defend their basic legal rights or seek meaningful redress and remedy through the courts when they have suffered significant wrongs and injuries at the hands of more powerful individuals corporations or government institutions.
exampleZh: Access to affordable legal representation 是任何 fair and effective justice system 的 fundamental component 因为没有它 ordinary citizens of modest financial means cannot practically defend their basic legal rights or seek meaningful redress and remedy through the courts when they have suffered significant wrongs and injuries at the hands of more powerful individuals corporations or government institutions

exampleEn: The environmental organization filed a major class-action lawsuit against the giant chemical manufacturing corporation on behalf of over fifteen thousand local residents whose drinking water supplies had been dangerously contaminated by toxic industrial waste that the company had knowingly and illegally dumped into the nearby river system over a period of more than two decades.
exampleZh: Environmental organization 代表超过一万五千名 local residents filed a major class-action lawsuit against the giant chemical manufacturing corporation 这些居民的 drinking water supplies 被 toxic industrial waste dangerously contaminated 该公司在超过 twenty years 的时间里 knowingly and illegally dumped 将这些 waste 排入附近的 river system

exampleEn: A skilled criminal defense lawyer must thoroughly investigate every aspect of the case independently interview all potential witnesses meticulously examine all physical evidence and carefully construct the strongest possible legal arguments to zealously represent and defend the legitimate interests and constitutional rights of their client at every stage of the complex criminal justice proceedings.
exampleZh: 一个 skilled criminal defense lawyer 必须 thoroughly investigate every aspect of the case independently interview all potential witnesses meticulously examine all physical evidence and carefully construct the strongest possible legal arguments 以 zealously represent and defend 其 client 的 legitimate interests and constitutional rights at every stage of the complex criminal justice proceedings

exampleEn: Several countries have recently decided to legalize and strictly regulate the previously prohibited personal possession and consumption of cannabis for recreational purposes citing the evident failure of decades of harsh criminal prohibition policies to reduce drug use and the enormous public resources wasted on arresting and imprisoning millions of non-violent low-level drug offenders.
exampleZh: 一些国家最近决定 legalize and strictly regulate 以前 prohibited 的 cannabis 的个人 possession and consumption for recreational purposes citing 数十年的 harsh criminal prohibition policies 在减少 drug use 方面的 evident failure 以及浪费在 arresting and imprisoning millions of non-violent low-level drug offenders 上的 enormous public resources

exampleEn: The company set aside over five hundred million dollars in its annual financial accounts to cover the expected costs of settling the numerous pending product liability litigation cases brought by thousands of individual patients who alleged they had suffered serious permanent injuries as a direct result of using the corporation's defective and allegedly dangerous medical device implants.
exampleZh: 公司在某 annual financial accounts 中 set aside over five hundred million dollars 以 cover 解决 numerous pending product liability litigation cases 的 expected costs 这些 cases 由 thousands of individual patients 提起 他们 alleged they had suffered serious permanent injuries as a direct result of using the corporation's defective and allegedly dangerous medical device implants

exampleEn: Powerful industry lobby groups spend enormous sums of money each year seeking to influence elected politicians and shape the content of proposed new legislation and government regulations in ways that will protect and advance the financial interests of the wealthy corporations and influential business sectors that generously fund their extensive political advocacy and public relations campaign operations.
exampleZh: Powerful industry lobby groups 每年花费 enormous sums of money seeking to influence elected politicians and shape the content of proposed new legislation and government regulations 以 protect and advance the financial interests of the wealthy corporations and influential business sectors that generously fund their extensive political advocacy and public relations campaign operations

exampleEn: The local magistrate has the limited legal authority to hear and decide relatively minor criminal cases and civil disputes involving small amounts of money and to issue search warrants and arrest warrants based on sworn statements of probable cause presented by police investigators seeking judicial authorization for specific investigative actions.
exampleZh: Local magistrate 拥有 limited legal authority 以 hear and decide relatively minor criminal cases and civil disputes involving small amounts of money 以及根据 police investigators seeking judicial authorization for specific investigative actions 所 presented 的 sworn statements of probable cause issue search warrants and arrest warrants

exampleEn: The new federal mandate requires all large corporations employing over five hundred workers to provide comprehensive health insurance coverage to their full-time employees or face substantial progressive financial penalties that increase significantly with each additional month of continued non-compliance with the legal requirement after the official regulatory implementation deadline has passed.
exampleZh: New federal mandate 要求所有雇用 over five hundred workers 的 large corporations 向其 full-time employees provide comprehensive health insurance coverage 否则 face substantial progressive financial penalties 在 official regulatory implementation deadline has passed 之后每 continued non-compliance 一个月 penalties 就 significantly increase

exampleEn: The popular mayor won reelection by a landslide margin of over thirty percentage points after her first term in office delivered significant measurable improvements in public transportation service quality crime reduction rates and the overall cleanliness and physical appearance of the city's public streets parks and community recreational spaces.
exampleZh: Popular mayor 以超过 thirty percentage points 的 landslide margin won reelection 在她的第一个任期 delivered significant measurable improvements in public transportation service quality crime reduction rates and the overall cleanliness and physical appearance of the city's public streets parks and community recreational spaces 之后

exampleEn: The health minister faced intense cross-party questioning in parliament over her department's allegedly slow and inadequate initial response to the rapidly escalating public health emergency that had already resulted in thousands of preventable deaths and was continuing to spread aggressively across multiple regions of the country largely unchecked and out of effective centralized administrative control.
exampleZh: Health minister 在 parliament 中 faced intense cross-party questioning 关于 her department's allegedly slow and inadequate initial response to the rapidly escalating public health emergency 该 emergency had already resulted in thousands of preventable deaths and was continuing to spread aggressively across multiple regions of the country largely unchecked and out of effective centralized administrative control

exampleEn: Before giving their official testimony in court each witness must solemnly swear a legally binding oath to tell the complete truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth fully aware that any deliberate false statement made under oath constitutes the serious criminal offense of perjury punishable by a substantial fine and a significant term of imprisonment.
exampleZh: 在法庭上提供 official testimony 之前 each witness must solemnly swear a legally binding oath to tell the complete truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth fully aware that any deliberate false statement made under oath constitutes the serious criminal offense of perjury punishable by a substantial fine and a significant term of imprisonment

exampleEn: Rehabilitation programs that provide education vocational training and psychological counseling to convicted criminal offender serving time in correctional facilities have been consistently shown to significantly reduce the rate at which released inmates reoffend and return to prison within the critical first three years following their initial discharge and return to the community.
exampleZh: 向在 correctional facilities 中 serving time 的 convicted criminal offender 提供 education vocational training and psychological counseling 的 Rehabilitation programs 已被 consistently shown to significantly reduce 被释放的 inmates 在 critical first three years following their initial discharge and return to the community 内 reoffend and return to prison 的 rate

exampleEn: The official opposition party in parliament has the important democratic function of publicly questioning and challenging the policies and decisions of the government of the day while also presenting alternative policy proposals and demonstrating to the voting public that they represent a credible and competent potential alternative government administration ready to assume power if called upon to do so at the next scheduled general election.
exampleZh: Parliament 中的 official opposition party 具有 publicly questioning and challenging the policies and decisions of the government of the day 的重要 democratic function 同时 also presenting alternative policy proposals and demonstrating to the voting public that they represent a credible and competent potential alternative government administration ready to assume power if called upon to do so at the next scheduled general election

exampleEn: The outgoing president exercised his constitutional power to grant a full and unconditional presidential pardon to the controversial political activist who had been imprisoned for over fifteen years on charges that many independent international legal experts and human rights organizations had long condemned as politically motivated and fundamentally unjust in their very nature and legal character.
exampleZh: Outgoing president 行使了他的 constitutional power to grant a full and unconditional presidential pardon 给那位 controversial political activist 他因 charges that many independent international legal experts and human rights organizations had long condemned as politically motivated and fundamentally unjust in their very nature and legal character 而被 imprisoned for over fifteen years

exampleEn: After months of intense and often acrimonious political debate the parliament finally approved the landmark climate change legislation by a narrow margin of just seven votes in the final dramatic floor division count with several members of the governing coalition breaking ranks to vote against their own party leadership's official recommended position on the highly controversial and closely contested bill.
exampleZh: 经过 months of intense and often acrimonious political debate parliament 以仅仅七票的 narrow margin 在最终的 dramatic floor division count 中 finally approved the landmark climate change legislation 其中 governing coalition 的几名成员 breaking ranks  voting against their own party leadership's official recommended position on the highly controversial and closely contested bill

exampleEn: The witness was later charged with the serious criminal offense of perjury after investigators obtained clear documentary evidence proving that she had deliberately and knowingly lied under oath about her exact whereabouts and activities on the crucial evening when the alleged crime was reported to have occurred according to the official police incident timeline reconstruction report.
exampleZh: Witness 后来被 charged with the serious criminal offense of perjury 在 investigators obtained clear documentary evidence proving that she had deliberately and knowingly lied under oath about her exact whereabouts and activities on the crucial evening when the alleged crime was reported to have occurred according to the official police incident timeline reconstruction report 之后

exampleEn: The plaintiff in the landmark civil rights case argued that she had been systematically discriminated against by her employer on the basis of her gender and national origin and was seeking substantial compensatory financial damages for the years of emotional distress lost career advancement opportunities and significant economic harm she had allegedly endured and continued to suffer as a direct result of the company's discriminatory employment policies and workplace practices.
exampleZh: Landmark civil rights case 中的 plaintiff 辩称她因 gender and national origin 被其 employer systematically discriminated against 并 seeking substantial compensatory financial damages for the years of emotional distress lost career advancement opportunities and significant economic harm she had allegedly endured and continued to suffer as a direct result of the company's discriminatory employment policies and workplace practices

exampleEn: The defendant unexpectedly changed his plea from not guilty to guilty on the third day of his criminal trial in a dramatic last-minute legal maneuver that his defense attorney explained was part of a carefully negotiated agreement with the prosecution intended to secure a significantly reduced prison sentence in exchange for his complete and truthful cooperation with several ongoing related federal criminal investigations.
exampleZh: Defendant 在其 criminal trial 的第三天 unexpectedly changed his plea from not guilty to guilty 这一 dramatic last-minute legal maneuver 他的 defense attorney 解释说是与 prosecution carefully negotiated agreement 的一部分 intended to secure a significantly reduced prison sentence in exchange for his complete and truthful cooperation with several ongoing related federal criminal investigations

exampleEn: Community policing strategies that emphasize building positive trusting relationships and open lines of respectful communication between local police officers and the neighborhood residents they serve have been shown to significantly improve both crime clearance rates and overall public satisfaction with and confidence in the fairness and effectiveness of local law enforcement services in diverse urban communities.
exampleZh: 强调在 local police officers 和他们所服务的 neighborhood residents 之间建立 positive trusting relationships and open lines of respectful communication 的 Community policing strategies 已被 shown to significantly improve crime clearance rates 和 diverse urban communities 中公众对 local law enforcement services 的 fairness and effectiveness 的 overall public satisfaction with and confidence in

exampleEn: The latest nationwide opinion poll conducted just two weeks before the scheduled election day shows the two leading candidates locked in a statistical dead heat with forty-seven percent of likely voters supporting each contender and the remaining six percent of the surveyed electorate still genuinely undecided about which candidate they ultimately intend to vote for on election day.
exampleZh: 在 scheduled election day 前仅两周进行的 latest nationwide opinion poll 显示两位 leading candidates 陷入 statistical dead heat 各自有百分之四十七的 likely voters 支持 剩下百分之六的 surveyed electorate 仍然 genuinely undecided about which candidate they ultimately intend to vote for on election day

exampleEn: The judge's groundbreaking ruling in this controversial and closely watched legal case established an important new binding legal precedent that all lower courts throughout the entire jurisdiction must now follow when deciding future cases that present substantially similar sets of relevant material facts and raise comparable fundamental questions of statutory interpretation and constitutional legal principle.
exampleZh: 法官在这个 controversial and closely watched legal case 中的 groundbreaking ruling 确立了一个重要的 new binding legal precedent 该 precedent 在该整个 jurisdiction 中所有 lower courts 在 deciding future cases that present substantially similar sets of relevant material facts and raise comparable fundamental questions of statutory interpretation and constitutional legal principle 时都必须 now follow

exampleEn: The lead prosecutor delivered a powerful and meticulously detailed opening statement to the jury outlining the mountain of forensic evidence documentary records and credible eyewitness testimony that the government would present during the trial to prove beyond any reasonable doubt that the accused individual had indeed committed every element of the serious criminal offenses with which he stood formally charged in the indictment.
exampleZh: Lead prosecutor 向陪审团 delivered a powerful and meticulously detailed opening statement 概述了 government 在审判期间将 present 以 prove beyond any reasonable doubt that the accused individual had indeed committed every element of the serious criminal offenses with which he stood formally charged in the indictment 的大量 forensic evidence documentary records and credible eyewitness testimony

exampleEn: Tens of thousands of peaceful demonstrators gathered in the capital's main public square to protest against the government's controversial decision to significantly reduce public spending on essential healthcare and education services while simultaneously cutting taxes for the wealthiest top one percent of individual income earners in the country.
exampleZh: 数以万计的 peaceful demonstrators 聚集在首都的 main public square 以 protest 反对政府 controversial decision to significantly reduce public spending on essential healthcare and education services 同时为该国最富有的 top one percent of individual income earners cutting taxes

exampleEn: Government agencies have the legal authority and the essential public responsibility to properly regulate potentially dangerous industries such as commercial aviation pharmaceutical manufacturing and nuclear power generation to ensure that strict mandatory safety standards designed to protect the health and lives of both workers and the general public are consistently met and rigorously enforced at all times.
exampleZh: Government agencies 拥有 legal authority 和 essential public responsibility to properly regulate potentially dangerous industries such as commercial aviation pharmaceutical manufacturing and nuclear power generation 以确保旨在保护 workers 和 general public 的 health and lives 的 strict mandatory safety standards 始终 consistently met and rigorously enforced

exampleEn: The veteran senator announced her retirement from elected politics after serving five consecutive six-year terms in the upper chamber of the national legislature totaling over three decades of distinguished and dedicated public service to her constituents in her home state and to the wider national interest of the entire country as a whole.
exampleZh: Veteran senator 在 national legislature 的 upper chamber 中 serving five consecutive six-year terms 总计 over three decades of distinguished and dedicated public service to her constituents in her home state and to the wider national interest of the entire country as a whole 之后 announced her retirement from elected politics

exampleEn: Under the clear and unambiguous language of the existing criminal statute any person who knowingly and intentionally provides false or materially misleading information on an official government document or application form is guilty of a serious criminal offense and shall be liable upon conviction to a term of imprisonment not exceeding five years and a substantial financial penalty to be determined by the sentencing court.
exampleZh: 根据 existing criminal statute 的 clear and unambiguous language 任何人 knowingly and intentionally provides false or materially misleading information on an official government document or application form 即构成 serious criminal offense 并 shall be liable upon conviction to a term of imprisonment not exceeding five years and a substantial financial penalty to be determined by the sentencing court

exampleEn: The congressional investigative committee issued a legally binding subpoena compelling the reluctant former senior executive to appear in person before the committee at a specified date and time to give sworn oral testimony and produce certain specifically identified categories of relevant corporate documents and internal business records in his actual physical possession custody or direct personal control.
exampleZh: Congressional investigative committee issued a legally binding subpoena compelling the reluctant former senior executive to appear in person before the committee at a specified date and time to give sworn oral testimony and produce certain specifically identified categories of relevant corporate documents and internal business records in his actual physical possession custody or direct personal control

exampleEn: The group of local residents decided to collectively sue the large factory complex for the significant and ongoing environmental damages caused by its continuous discharge of untreated toxic industrial waste materials into the community's only source of clean drinking water over a period spanning more than fifteen years of negligent and knowing polluting conduct.
exampleZh: Group of local residents decided to collectively sue the large factory complex for the significant and ongoing environmental damages caused by its continuous discharge of untreated toxic industrial waste materials into the community's only source of clean drinking water over a period spanning more than fifteen years of negligent and knowing polluting conduct

exampleEn: The court clerk issued an official legal summons requiring the reluctant witness to appear before the judge at the specified date time and location to provide crucial oral testimony under oath regarding what she claimed to have personally seen and heard on the evening of the alleged criminal incident that was the central subject of the ongoing judicial proceedings against the accused individual.
exampleZh: Court clerk issued an official legal summons requiring the reluctant witness to appear before the judge at the specified date time and location to provide crucial oral testimony under oath regarding what she claimed to have personally seen and heard on the evening of the alleged criminal incident that was the central subject of the ongoing judicial proceedings against the accused individual

exampleEn: The key prosecution witness agreed to testify against the alleged leader of the organized criminal enterprise in exchange for full legal immunity from any future criminal prosecution related to her own admitted minor involvement in the peripheral activities of the same criminal organization over the previous several years of its illicit operations.
exampleZh: Key prosecution witness agreed to testify against the alleged leader of the organized criminal enterprise in exchange for full legal immunity from any future criminal prosecution related to her own admitted minor involvement in the peripheral activities of the same criminal organization over the previous several years of its illicit operations

exampleEn: The landmark international climate treaty signed by one hundred and ninety-seven countries in Paris in 2015 commits all signatory nations to take concrete measurable actions to limit the increase in global average temperatures to well below two degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels by the end of the current century.
exampleZh: 2015年由一百九十七个国家在巴黎签署的 landmark international climate treaty 承诺所有 signatory nations take concrete measurable actions 以在本世纪末将 global average temperatures 的 increase 限制在 well below two degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels

exampleEn: The Supreme Court in a landmark six-to-three majority ruling declared that the government's controversial new mandatory identification card law was fundamentally unconstitutional because it violated the basic individual privacy rights and personal liberty protections that are explicitly and unambiguously guaranteed to every citizen under the express terms of the national constitution's foundational bill of individual rights and freedoms.
exampleZh: Supreme Court 在 landmark six-to-three majority ruling 中 declared that the government's controversial new mandatory identification card law 是 fundamentally unconstitutional 因为它 violated the basic individual privacy rights and personal liberty protections that are explicitly and unambiguously guaranteed to every citizen under the express terms of the national constitution's foundational bill of individual rights and freedoms

exampleEn: The president exercised her constitutional veto power to block the controversial tax reform legislation that had narrowly passed through both houses of parliament arguing that the proposed sweeping changes to the national tax code would disproportionately benefit the wealthiest citizens while significantly increasing the overall tax burden on middle-income working families across the entire country.
exampleZh: President exercised her constitutional veto power to block the controversial tax reform legislation that had narrowly passed through both houses of parliament  arguing that the proposed sweeping changes to the national tax code would disproportionately benefit the wealthiest citizens 同时 significantly increasing the overall tax burden on middle-income working families across the entire country

exampleEn: In a healthy functioning democracy every eligible adult citizen has both the precious individual right and the solemn collective civic responsibility to inform themselves about the important public policy issues facing their society and to regularly exercise their democratic franchise by casting an informed and thoughtful vote in free and fair elections at every level of government from the local to the national.
exampleZh: 在 healthy functioning democracy 中 每个 eligible adult citizen 都有 precious individual right 和 solemn collective civic responsibility 了解其社会面临的 important public policy issues 并通过在从 local 到 national 的 every level of government 的 free and fair elections 中 casting an informed and thoughtful vote 来 regularly exercise their democratic franchise

exampleEn: The police detectives obtained a formal search warrant from a judge specifically authorizing them to enter and thoroughly search the suspect's private residence and to seize any physical items or documentary evidence that might be directly relevant to their ongoing criminal investigation into the large-scale drug trafficking and money laundering operation spanning multiple states across the country.
exampleZh: Police detectives obtained a formal search warrant from a judge specifically authorizing them to enter and thoroughly search the suspect's private residence and to seize any physical items or documentary evidence that might be directly relevant to their ongoing criminal investigation into the large-scale drug trafficking and money laundering operation spanning multiple states across the country

exampleEn: The terrified eyewitness was placed under round-the-clock police protection after receiving multiple credible death threats warning her not to testify in court against the notorious gang leader who was facing trial for three counts of first-degree premeditated murder and numerous other serious violent criminal charges related to his alleged leadership of a dangerous organized crime syndicate.
exampleZh: Terrified eyewitness 在收到 multiple credible death threats warning her not to testify in court against the notorious gang leader who was facing trial for three counts of first-degree premeditated murder and numerous other serious violent criminal charges related to his alleged leadership of a dangerous organized crime syndicate 后被置于 round-the-clock police protection 之下

exampleEn: The independent anti-corruption commission launched a thorough formal investigation into serious allegations of financial wrongdoing and gross ethical misconduct by several senior government officials following the publication of a series of devastating investigative news reports containing detailed evidence of apparent bribery fraud and systematic abuse of public office for illicit private financial enrichment and personal gain.
exampleZh: Independent anti-corruption commission launched a thorough formal investigation into serious allegations of financial wrongdoing and gross ethical misconduct by several senior government officials following the publication of a series of devastating investigative news reports containing detailed evidence of apparent bribery fraud and systematic abuse of public office for illicit private financial enrichment and personal gain

exampleEn: The couple decided to adopt a child from the overseas orphanage after years of struggling with infertility and undergoing multiple unsuccessful and emotionally draining rounds of expensive medical fertility treatment procedures at several different specialized reproductive health clinics.
exampleZh: The couple decided to adopt a child from the overseas orphanage after years of struggling with infertility and undergoing multiple unsuccessful and emotionally draining rounds of expensive medical fertility treatment procedures at several different specialized reproductive health clinics

exampleEn: The radiant bride walked slowly down the long flower-decorated aisle on the arm of her proud father as the string quartet played a beautiful classical piece that her late grandmother had specifically requested for this exact moment many years earlier.
exampleZh: Radiant bride 在 proud father 的搀扶下沿着长长的 flower-decorated aisle slowly walked 同时 string quartet played 一首她已故 grandmother 多年前为此 exact moment specifically requested 的 beautiful classical piece

exampleEn: The local food bank charity distributes over five tons of donated non-perishable food items to struggling low-income families and elderly individuals living on fixed pensions throughout the community each and every week of the year without interruption even during holidays and severe weather events.
exampleZh: Local food bank charity 每周 each and every week of the year distributes over five tons of donated non-perishable food items to struggling low-income families and elderly individuals living on fixed pensions throughout the community 即使在 holidays and severe weather events 期间也不中断

exampleEn: In many traditional societies the extended family clan continues to play a central role in major life decisions including marriage arrangements career choices and the care of elderly relatives who typically live with their adult children rather than being placed in impersonal commercial residential care facilities for the aged and infirm.
exampleZh: 在许多 traditional societies 中 extended family clan 在包括 marriage arrangements career choices and the care of elderly relatives who typically live with their adult children rather than being placed in impersonal commercial residential care facilities for the aged and infirm 在内的 major life decisions 中继续 plays a central role

exampleEn: Teaching young children the fundamental importance of showing genuine compassion and empathy toward others who may be suffering or less fortunate than themselves is widely considered by child development experts to be one of the most valuable and enduring moral lessons that any caring parent or dedicated educator can ever hope to impart to the next generation of human beings.
exampleZh: Teaching young children the fundamental importance of showing genuine compassion and empathy toward others who may be suffering or less fortunate than themselves 被 child development experts widely considered 是任何 caring parent or dedicated educator can ever hope to impart to the next generation of human beings 的最 valuable and enduring moral lessons 之一

exampleEn: The elderly couple who had been happily married for over sixty years still held hands affectionately every evening as they walked slowly together through the quiet neighborhood park near their modest home just as they had done since the earliest days of their long and loving relationship together as young newlywed sweethearts in their early twenties many decades ago.
exampleZh: Elderly couple who had been happily married for over sixty years 仍然每天晚上 affectionately held hands 一起 slowly walked through the quiet neighborhood park near their modest home just as they had done since the earliest days of their long and loving relationship together as young newlywed sweethearts in their early twenties many decades ago

exampleEn: The divorce rate in many developed countries has actually declined steadily over the past two decades particularly among younger couples who tend to marry later in life after completing their higher education and establishing more stable professional careers and financial foundations before making the serious lifelong commitment of marriage.
exampleZh: divorce rate 在许多 developed countries 中在过去二十年实际上 steadily declined 特别是在 younger couples 中 他们往往在完成 higher education 并建立了更 stable professional careers and financial foundations 后在做出 marriage 的 serious lifelong commitment 之前 later in life marry

exampleEn: The generous anonymous donation of five million dollars to the struggling community hospital will fund the construction of a much-needed new pediatric wing dedicated to providing specialized medical care for seriously ill children from low-income families throughout the entire surrounding rural region who previously had to travel over three hours to reach the nearest children's hospital facility.
exampleZh: Generous anonymous donation of five million dollars to the struggling community hospital 将 fund the construction of a much-needed new pediatric wing dedicated to providing specialized medical care for seriously ill children from low-income families throughout the entire surrounding rural region who previously had to travel over three hours to reach the nearest children's hospital facility

exampleEn: The rapidly aging population in many developed countries presents enormous and growing challenges for government policymakers who must find sustainable and financially viable ways to adequately fund the increasing costs of public pensions healthcare services and specialized social care programs for the expanding elderly demographic cohort over the coming decades ahead.
exampleZh: Rapidly aging population 在许多 developed countries 中对 government policymakers 构成了 enormous and growing challenges 他们必须找到 sustainable and financially viable 的方式来在 coming decades ahead 为 expanding elderly demographic cohort adequately fund the increasing costs of public pensions healthcare services and specialized social care programs

exampleEn: Achieving genuine gender equality in the workplace requires not only robust anti-discrimination legislation and strong enforcement mechanisms but also profound and lasting changes in deep-rooted cultural attitudes and traditional expectations regarding the appropriate division of unpaid domestic labor and childcare responsibilities between working men and women within modern family households today.
exampleZh: Achieving genuine gender equality in the workplace 不仅需要 robust anti-discrimination legislation and strong enforcement mechanisms 还需要 profound and lasting changes in deep-rooted cultural attitudes and traditional expectations regarding the appropriate division of unpaid domestic labor and childcare responsibilities between working men and women within modern family households today

exampleEn: The solemn funeral ceremony was attended by over five hundred mourners from all walks of life who had traveled from across the country to pay their final personal respects to the beloved community leader who had dedicated over forty years of her life to tirelessly serving the needs of the poorest and most vulnerable residents of the struggling inner-city neighborhood she called home.
exampleZh: Solemn funeral ceremony 有来自各行各业的 over five hundred mourners 参加 他们从全国各地 traveled 来向这位 beloved community leader 致以 final personal respects 她 dedicated over forty years of her life to tirelessly serving the needs of the poorest and most vulnerable residents of the struggling inner-city neighborhood she called home

exampleEn: The younger generation of digital natives who have grown up with smartphones and constant social media connectivity from early childhood communicate form relationships and engage with the wider world around them in ways that are fundamentally and perhaps permanently different from all previous generations of human beings that have ever lived throughout the entire course of recorded human history and civilization.
exampleZh: Younger generation of digital natives who have grown up with smartphones and constant social media connectivity from early childhood 以与 entire course of recorded human history and civilization 中曾经生活过的所有 previous generations of human beings fundamentally and perhaps permanently different 的方式 communicate form relationships and engage with the wider world around them
