exampleEn: When both biological parents are tragically deceased or have been legally deemed unfit to properly care for their minor children due to serious issues such as chronic substance abuse or documented patterns of severe neglect or physical abuse a court may formally appoint a responsible adult relative or qualified family friend to serve as the child's permanent legal guardian and primary caregiver going forward into the foreseeable future.
exampleZh: 当 both biological parents 不幸 deceased 或因 chronic substance abuse or documented patterns of severe neglect or physical abuse 等 serious issues 被 legally deemed unfit to properly care for their minor children 时 court 可以 formally appoint a responsible adult relative or qualified family friend 担任该 child's permanent legal guardian and primary caregiver going forward into the foreseeable future

exampleEn: New parents are often overwhelmed by the sheer constant demands of caring for a helpless newborn infant who requires feeding approximately every two to three hours around the clock for the first several months of life leaving the exhausted mother and father with very little opportunity for uninterrupted restful sleep or any meaningful personal leisure time whatsoever.
exampleZh: New parents 常常被照顾 helpless newborn infant 的 sheer constant demands overwhelmed 该 infant 在生命的头几个月里需要 approximately every two to three hours around the clock feeding 给 exhausted mother and father 留下了 very little opportunity for uninterrupted restful sleep or any meaningful personal leisure time whatsoever

exampleEn: Many people around the world have become increasingly interested in tracing their detailed family lineage back through multiple generations using a combination of modern commercial DNA ancestry testing services and traditional genealogical research methods involving the careful examination of old birth certificates marriage records and other historical archival documents and family paper records.
exampleZh: Many people around the world 已变得 increasingly interested in tracing their detailed family lineage back through multiple generations 使用 modern commercial DNA ancestry testing services 和涉及 carefully examination of old birth certificates marriage records and other historical archival documents and family paper records 的 traditional genealogical research methods 的组合

exampleEn: The institution of marriage has undergone profound and far-reaching social changes over the past half century with people in most developed countries now tending to marry significantly later in life having fewer children on average and being far more likely to eventually divorce than was the case for any previous generation in modern recorded human demographic and social scientific history.
exampleZh: Institution of marriage 在过去半个世纪中经历了 profound and far-reaching social changes 现在大多数 developed countries 中的人们往往 significantly later in life marry on average having fewer children 且 far more likely to eventually divorce 比 modern recorded human demographic and social scientific history 中任何 previous generation 的情况

exampleEn: The proud aunt beamed with barely disguised joy and satisfaction as she watched her favorite nephew walk confidently across the large university stage to receive his hard-earned medical degree diploma at the formal graduation ceremony after eight long years of intensive and demanding academic study and clinical training at the prestigious medical school.
exampleZh: Proud aunt 在她 favorite nephew confidently walk across the large university stage 在 prestigious medical school 经过 eight long years of intensive and demanding academic study and clinical training 后在 the formal graduation ceremony 上 receive his hard-earned medical degree diploma 时 beamed with barely disguised joy and satisfaction

exampleEn: The devoted uncle spent countless patient hours teaching his young niece how to play the difficult piano pieces that her late mother had once performed so beautifully at family gatherings and special celebrations before her tragic and untimely passing from a sudden and devastating illness just two years earlier.
exampleZh: Devoted uncle spent countless patient hours teaching his young niece how to play the difficult piano pieces that her late mother had once performed so beautifully at family gatherings and special celebrations before her tragic and untimely passing from a sudden and devastating illness just two years earlier

exampleEn: The newspaper obituary painted a vivid and deeply moving portrait of the deceased as a person of remarkable kindness unwavering integrity and quiet generosity of spirit who had touched and improved the lives of countless people throughout the local community during her long and meaningful life without ever seeking or expecting any public recognition or personal reward for her tireless and selfless good works and charitable efforts.
exampleZh: Newspaper obituary painted a vivid and deeply moving portrait of the deceased as a person of remarkable kindness unwavering integrity and quiet generosity of spirit who had touched and improved the lives of countless people throughout the local community during her long and meaningful life without ever seeking or expecting any public recognition or personal reward for her tireless and selfless good works and charitable efforts

exampleEn: The charitable foundation established over a century ago by a wealthy philanthropist continues to provide food shelter education and loving professional care for hundreds of orphaned and abandoned children each year who would otherwise face an uncertain and potentially very difficult future without the protection and support of a stable caring family environment or a well-run institutional residential care facility for vulnerable displaced children.
exampleZh: Charitable foundation 在一个多世纪前由 a wealthy philanthropist established 每年继续为数百名 orphaned and abandoned children provide food shelter education and loving professional care 如果没有 stable caring family environment or a well-run institutional residential care facility for vulnerable displaced children 的保护和支持 他们将 face an uncertain and potentially very difficult future

exampleEn: Modern parenting experts increasingly emphasize the critical importance of fostering secure emotional attachment between infants and their primary caregivers during the crucial first three years of life because this early nurturing bond lays the essential psychological foundation for all future healthy social relationships emotional resilience and positive mental wellbeing outcomes throughout childhood adolescence and into adult life beyond.
exampleZh: Modern parenting experts increasingly emphasize the critical importance of fostering secure emotional attachment between infants and their primary caregivers during the crucial first three years of life 因为这种早期 nurturing bond 为整个 childhood adolescence and into adult life beyond 中所有未来 healthy social relationships emotional resilience and positive mental wellbeing outcomes 奠定了 essential psychological foundation

exampleEn: Breaking the vicious generational cycle of poverty requires sustained and coordinated long-term public investment in several key areas simultaneously including high-quality early childhood education affordable access to comprehensive preventive healthcare services stable affordable housing options and effective job training and vocational skills development programs for unemployed and underemployed working-age adults from all segments of the diverse population.
exampleZh: Breaking the vicious generational cycle of poverty 需要同时在几个关键领域 sustained and coordinated long-term public investment 包括 high-quality early childhood education affordable access to comprehensive preventive healthcare services stable affordable housing options and effective job training and vocational skills development programs for unemployed and underemployed working-age adults from all segments of the diverse population

exampleEn: Many older workers are choosing to gradually phase into retirement by reducing their working hours over several years rather than stopping work completely on a single fixed date because this gentler and more flexible transitional approach allows them to adjust more smoothly both financially and psychologically to the profound lifestyle changes that accompany the end of their regular full-time professional careers.
exampleZh: 许多 older workers 选择通过 over several years reducing their working hours gradually phase into retirement 而不是在 single fixed date 上 completely stopping work 因为这种 gentler and more flexible transitional approach 使他们能够更 smoothly adjust both financially and psychologically to the profound lifestyle changes that accompany the end of their regular full-time professional careers

exampleEn: The extended family reunion held every summer brings together over one hundred relatives from four different generations spanning an incredible range of ages from newborn infants to great-grandparents in their late nineties all gathering to share delicious traditional home-cooked food exchange family stories and memories and renew the precious bonds of kinship and shared family heritage and identity.
exampleZh: 每年夏天举行的 extended family reunion 将来自 four different generations 的 over one hundred relatives brings together 年龄跨度从 newborn infants 到 late nineties 的 great-grandparents 大家 gathering to share delicious traditional home-cooked food exchange family stories and memories and renew the precious bonds of kinship and shared family heritage and identity

exampleEn: Research consistently suggests that the quality of the emotional relationship between sibling during childhood has a lasting and significant impact on a person's long-term social development emotional intelligence and overall psychological wellbeing throughout adolescence and well into their adult life decades later than might be commonly assumed or generally recognized by most people.
exampleZh: Research consistently suggests that childhood 期间 sibling 之间 emotional relationship 的 quality 对一个人的 long-term social development emotional intelligence and overall psychological wellbeing throughout adolescence and well into their adult life decades later 具有 lasting and significant impact 比大多数人 commonly assumed or generally recognized 的更大

exampleEn: Caring full-time for an elderly spouse who is suffering from a progressive and ultimately terminal degenerative illness such as advanced Alzheimer's disease can place an enormous and often overwhelming physical emotional and financial strain on the devoted caregiving husband or wife who must somehow find the inner strength and personal resilience to cope with this relentless daily challenge month after difficult month and year after exhausting year of dedicated loving service.
exampleZh: Full-time caring for an elderly spouse who is suffering from a progressive and ultimately terminal degenerative illness such as advanced Alzheimer's disease 可能会给 devoted caregiving husband or wife 带来 enormous and often overwhelming physical emotional and financial strain 他们必须 somehow find the inner strength and personal resilience 以 month after difficult month and year after exhausting year of dedicated loving service cope with this relentless daily challenge

exampleEn: Thousands of ordinary citizens from all walks of life and every corner of the country selflessly volunteer their limited free time each week to support a wide variety of worthy charitable causes and community organizations ranging from local homeless shelters and food banks to environmental conservation projects and literacy tutoring programs for disadvantaged children struggling to keep up in school.
exampleZh: 来自全国各地的各行各业和每一个角落的数千 ordinary citizens 每周 selflessly volunteer their limited free time 以支持广泛的 worthy charitable causes and community organizations 从 local homeless shelters and food banks 到 environmental conservation projects and literacy tutoring programs for disadvantaged children struggling to keep up in school

exampleEn: The couple spent nearly two years carefully planning every last intricate detail of their dream wedding from the elegant floral arrangements and the formal multi-course seated dinner menu to the live orchestra playlist for the evening dancing reception and the personalized handwritten thank-you notes awaiting each guest at their carefully arranged place setting on every table.
exampleZh: The couple spent nearly two years carefully planning every last intricate detail of their dream wedding 从 elegant floral arrangements and formal multi-course seated dinner menu 到 evening dancing reception 的 live orchestra playlist 以及每张桌子上 carefully arranged place setting 处 awaiting each guest 的 personalized handwritten thank-you notes

exampleEn: The elderly widow had lived alone in the same modest family home for over thirty years since her beloved husband of nearly five decades had suddenly passed away from an unexpected heart attack leaving her to carry on alone with quiet dignity and resilience surrounded by cherished memories and the fading photographs of their long and happy life together.
exampleZh: Elderly widow 在她 beloved husband of nearly five decades suddenly passed away from an unexpected heart attack 后已独自住在同一所 modest family home over thirty years 带着 quiet dignity and resilience  surrounded by cherished memories and the fading photographs of their long and happy life together carry on alone

exampleEn: Investing adequately in the education skills development and healthy personal growth of the nation's youth is widely and rightly regarded as the single most important long-term investment that any forward-looking society can possibly make in its own future prosperity social stability and continued economic competitiveness in an increasingly interconnected and fiercely competitive global marketplace for talent innovation and human capital development.
exampleZh: Investing adequately in the education skills development and healthy personal growth of the nation's youth 被广泛且 rightly regarded 为任何 forward-looking society can possibly make in its own future prosperity social stability and continued economic competitiveness in an increasingly interconnected and fiercely competitive global marketplace for talent innovation and human capital development 的 single most important long-term investment

exampleEn: Studying abroad for at least one full academic semester has become an increasingly popular and highly valued component of the modern undergraduate educational experience with more than five million university students now choosing to complete part of their degree studies in a foreign country each year.
exampleZh: Studying abroad for at least one full academic semester 已成为 modern undergraduate educational experience 的一个 increasingly popular and highly valued component 现在每年有超过五百万 university students choosing to complete part of their degree studies in a foreign country

exampleEn: The budget airline revolutionized the European travel industry by offering incredibly low base fares while charging additional fees for virtually every extra service including seat selection checked baggage allowance and even a small cup of drinking water served during the two-hour flight duration.
exampleZh: Budget airline 通过提供 incredibly low base fares 同时为几乎每项 extra service 包括 seat selection checked baggage allowance 甚至 two-hour flight duration 期间提供的一小杯 drinking water 收取 additional fees 从而 revolutionized the European travel industry

exampleEn: The young backpacker spent six adventurous months traveling on a shoestring budget through twelve different countries across Southeast Asia relying primarily on crowded local buses overnight trains and the occasional shared taxi to move between the many fascinating and culturally diverse destinations on her carefully planned extended travel itinerary through the vibrant and colorful region.
exampleZh: Young backpacker spent six adventurous months traveling on a shoestring budget through twelve different countries across Southeast Asia 主要 relying on crowded local buses overnight trains and the occasional shared taxi 以在其 carefully planned extended travel itinerary through the vibrant and colorful region 上 move between the many fascinating and culturally diverse destinations

exampleEn: The airline announced that boarding would begin in approximately twenty minutes and reminded all waiting passengers to have their valid passport and printed or mobile boarding pass readily available for inspection by the gate agent before proceeding down the jet bridge onto the awaiting aircraft.
exampleZh: Airline announced that boarding would begin in approximately twenty minutes 并 reminded all waiting passengers to have their valid passport and printed or mobile boarding pass readily available 以便 gate agent 在 proceed down the jet bridge onto the awaiting aircraft 之前 inspection

exampleEn: The colorful travel brochure displayed on the hotel lobby rack featured stunning full-page photographs of pristine white-sand beaches crystal-clear turquoise lagoon waters and luxurious overwater bungalow villas that made the remote tropical island resort destination look like an absolutely irresistible and magical paradise on earth waiting to be discovered and explored.
exampleZh: Hotel lobby rack 上展示的 colorful travel brochure 以 pristine white-sand beaches crystal-clear turquoise lagoon waters and luxurious overwater bungalow villas 的 stunning full-page photographs 为特色 使这个 remote tropical island resort destination 看起来像 waiting to be discovered and explored 的地球上一个 absolutely irresistible and magical paradise

exampleEn: The hotel's efficient online checkin system allows arriving guests to bypass the typically long and slow-moving queue at the crowded front reception desk entirely and proceed directly to their pre-assigned room using a secure digital key sent conveniently to their personal smartphone device before they even arrive at the property entrance.
exampleZh: Hotel's efficient online checkin system 允许 arriving guests entirely bypass the typically long and slow-moving queue at the crowded front reception desk 并使用在他们 even arrive at the property entrance 之前 conveniently sent 到其 personal smartphone device 的 secure digital key directly proceed to their pre-assigned room

exampleEn: The luxury cruise ship carrying over four thousand passengers and nearly two thousand crew members made scheduled stops at seven different tropical island destinations during its two-week Caribbean voyage through some of the most beautiful and sought-after warm-water sailing and vacation waters anywhere on the entire planet.
exampleZh: Carrying over four thousand passengers and nearly two thousand crew members 的 luxury cruise ship 在其为期两周的 Caribbean voyage 期间在七个不同的 tropical island destinations made scheduled stops 穿越整个星球上一些最美丽且最 sought-after warm-water sailing and vacation waters

exampleEn: International travelers must declare any restricted food items valuable goods or large quantities of currency exceeding ten thousand dollars in total value when passing through the customs inspection checkpoint upon arriving at their international destination airport after a long international flight from a foreign country of departure and origin abroad.
exampleZh: International travelers 在从国外的 foreign country of departure and origin 经过 long international flight 抵达其 international destination airport 后经过 customs inspection checkpoint 时必须 declare 任何 restricted food items valuable goods or 总价值超过一万美元的大量 large quantities of currency

exampleEn: The flight information display screens throughout the busy international airport terminal suddenly flickered and updated to show that our long-delayed departure had been pushed back yet another frustrating hour due to unforeseen ongoing mechanical issues with the assigned aircraft that maintenance crews were still working urgently to resolve and repair on the tarmac outside.
exampleZh: Busy international airport terminal 各处的 flight information display screens 突然 flickered and updated 以显示我们 long-delayed departure 又被推迟了令人沮丧的 another hour 由于 assigned aircraft 的 unforeseen ongoing mechanical issues  maintenance crews 仍在停机坪上 urgently working to resolve and repair

exampleEn: The sprawling dutyfree shopping complex located in the secure international transit area of the major hub airport offers travelers substantial discounts on high-end luxury cosmetics premium alcoholic spirits designer fragrances and expensive imported confectionery products compared to the standard recommended retail prices charged in regular downtown high street shops outside the airport perimeter.
exampleZh: Major hub airport secure international transit area 内位于的 sprawling dutyfree shopping complex 为 travelers 提供高端 luxury cosmetics premium alcoholic spirits designer fragrances and expensive imported confectionery products 的 substantial discounts 与 airport perimeter 外 regular downtown high street shops 收取的 standard recommended retail prices 相比

exampleEn: The optional day-long shore excursion offered cruise passengers a rare and unforgettable opportunity to visit an ancient mountainside temple complex that had been continuously inhabited and maintained by a small community of devoted Buddhist monks for well over one thousand years of remarkably peaceful and largely uninterrupted religious contemplative life and spiritual devotional practice and tradition.
exampleZh: Optional day-long shore excursion 为 cruise passengers 提供了一个 rare and unforgettable opportunity 参观一个 ancient mountainside temple complex 该 temple 已由一小群 devoted Buddhist monks continuously inhabited and maintained 了 well over one thousand years of remarkably peaceful and largely uninterrupted religious contemplative life and spiritual devotional practice and tradition

exampleEn: The veteran globetrotter had visited over one hundred and twenty countries across all seven continents during her remarkable fifty-year traveling career collecting colorful visas unique local handicrafts and countless fascinating stories of adventurous encounters with diverse cultures and interesting people in every corner of the inhabited world.
exampleZh: Veteran globetrotter 在其 remarkable fifty-year traveling career 中 visited over one hundred and twenty countries across all seven continents 收集了 colorful visas unique local handicrafts 以及 countless fascinating stories of adventurous encounters with diverse cultures and interesting people in every corner of the inhabited world

exampleEn: The experienced local mountain guide led our small trekking group safely across a treacherous narrow rocky ridgeline path with steep thousand-meter vertical drops on both sides while calmly and patiently pointing out rare alpine wildflowers and telling fascinating traditional folk stories about the sacred cultural significance of the surrounding snowcapped peaks to the indigenous communities living in the deep green valleys far below us.
exampleZh: Experienced local mountain guide 带领我们的小 trekking group safely across a treacherous narrow rocky ridgeline path with steep thousand-meter vertical drops on both sides 同时 calmly and patiently pointing out rare alpine wildflowers and telling fascinating traditional folk stories about the surrounding snowcapped peaks 对生活在 far below us deep green valleys 中的 indigenous communities 的 sacred cultural significance

exampleEn: The small family-run guesthouse perched dramatically on the edge of a towering cliff overlooking the endless blue expanse of the Mediterranean Sea offered clean comfortable rooms warm traditional hospitality and delicious home-cooked local meals at a tiny fraction of the inflated prices charged by the large impersonal luxury resort hotels located along the crowded and noisy beachfront strip several winding kilometers further down the steep and narrow coastal hillside road below.
exampleZh: Small family-run guesthouse perched dramatically on the edge of a towering cliff overlooking the endless blue expanse of the Mediterranean Sea 提供 clean comfortable rooms warm traditional hospitality and delicious home-cooked local meals 价格仅为 crowded and noisy beachfront strip several winding kilometers further down the steep and narrow coastal hillside road below 沿线 large impersonal luxury resort hotels 收取的 inflated prices 的 tiny fraction

exampleEn: The well-thumbed travel guidebook recommended a tiny family-owned seafood restaurant hidden away in a maze of narrow cobblestone back alleys in the old historic quarter of the port city that turned out to serve the most delicious and authentically prepared traditional regional cuisine that any of us had ever tasted in our entire lives of dining and travel experiences combined.
exampleZh: Well-thumbed travel guidebook 推荐了一家 tiny family-owned seafood restaurant hidden away in a maze of narrow cobblestone back alleys in the old historic quarter of the port city 结果这家餐厅提供了我们所有人 entire lives of dining and travel experiences combined 中品尝过的最 delicious and authentically prepared traditional regional cuisine

exampleEn: Comprehensive travel insurance that covers unexpected emergency medical treatment abroad including the potentially astronomical cost of an urgent air ambulance evacuation from a remote destination back to one's home country for advanced hospital care is an absolutely essential and non-negotiable requirement for any sensible international traveler planning to visit distant regions of the developing world with limited local healthcare infrastructure and medical facilities.
exampleZh: 覆盖国外 unexpected emergency medical treatment abroad 包括从 remote destination urgent air ambulance evacuation 回到本国接受 advanced hospital care 的 potentially astronomical cost 的 Comprehensive travel insurance 对任何 sensible international traveler planning to visit distant regions of the developing world with limited local healthcare infrastructure and medical facilities 来说都是一项 absolutely essential and non-negotiable requirement

exampleEn: Seasoned international business travelers have developed various effective personal strategies for minimizing the debilitating effects of severe jetlag after long-haul transoceanic flights across multiple distant time zones including carefully timing their exposure to natural daylight staying well hydrated by drinking plenty of plain water throughout the long flight journey and strictly avoiding all alcohol and caffeine consumption during and immediately after their extended air travel experience across the globe.
exampleZh: Seasoned international business travelers 已经 developed various effective personal strategies for minimizing the debilitating effects of severe jetlag after long-haul transoceanic flights across multiple distant time zones 包括 carefully timing their exposure to natural daylight 通过在长途飞行期间 drinking plenty of plain water 来 staying well hydrated 以及在 extended air travel experience across the globe 期间和 immediately after strictly avoiding all alcohol and caffeine consumption

exampleEn: The exhausting three-day train journey across the vast empty expanse of the Siberian wilderness in the depths of the brutally cold Russian winter offered the adventurous travelers a unique and unforgettable opportunity to witness firsthand some of the most remote starkly beautiful and sparsely populated natural landscapes remaining anywhere on the surface of the entire planet earth in the modern era of global mass tourism and ubiquitous instant digital connectivity.
exampleZh: Exhausting three-day train journey across the vast empty expanse of the Siberian wilderness in the depths of the brutally cold Russian winter 为 adventurous travelers 提供了一个 unique and unforgettable opportunity 以 firsthand witness 在 modern era of global mass tourism and ubiquitous instant digital connectivity 中 entire planet earth 表面上仍然存在的 some of the most remote starkly beautiful and sparsely populated natural landscapes

exampleEn: The unexpected twelve-hour layover at the sprawling Middle Eastern hub airport turned out to be a surprisingly pleasant and culturally enriching experience thanks to the comfortable complimentary transit hotel room delicious Arabic coffee and dates served in the elegant business class lounge and the fascinating free guided tour of the nearby historic old city center souk markets and architectural landmarks offered to all transit passengers with extended connection waiting times between their scheduled onward international flights.
exampleZh: Sprawling Middle Eastern hub airport 的 unexpected twelve-hour layover turned out to be a surprisingly pleasant and culturally enriching experience thanks to comfortable complimentary transit hotel room elegant business class lounge 中提供的 delicious Arabic coffee and dates 以及为所有 extended connection waiting times between their scheduled onward international flights 的 transit passengers 提供的 nearby historic old city center souk markets and architectural landmarks 的 fascinating free guided tour

exampleEn: Despite the near-universal prevalence of sophisticated smartphone GPS navigation applications among modern international travelers these days many adventurous explorers still prefer the tactile experience and the broader contextual overview provided by a good old-fashioned large-format paper map spread out across a table or pinned to a wall when planning and discussing their upcoming ambitious overland travel routes through unfamiliar and potentially challenging foreign terrain and remote wilderness areas ahead.
exampleZh: 尽管 sophisticated smartphone GPS navigation applications 在 modern international travelers 中 near-universal prevalence 如今 many adventurous explorers 在 planning and discussing their upcoming ambitious overland travel routes through unfamiliar and potentially challenging foreign terrain and remote wilderness areas ahead 时仍然 prefer 铺在桌子上或钉在墙上的 good old-fashioned large-format paper map 所提供的 tactile experience 和 broader contextual overview

exampleEn: Digital nomad who work remotely online from their laptop computers while continuously traveling the world have become an increasingly visible and economically significant demographic phenomenon in many affordable tropical destinations across Southeast Asia and Latin America where low living costs reliable WiFi internet infrastructure and vibrant expatriate social communities combine to create an attractive lifestyle proposition for location-independent professionals from wealthy developed countries seeking adventure and freedom from the constraints of traditional office-based employment.
exampleZh: Digital nomad who work remotely online from their laptop computers while continuously traveling the world 已成为在许多 affordable tropical destinations across Southeast Asia and Latin America 中一个 increasingly visible and economically significant demographic phenomenon 在那里 low living costs reliable WiFi internet infrastructure and vibrant expatriate social communities combine to create an attractive lifestyle proposition for location-independent professionals from wealthy developed countries seeking adventure and freedom from the constraints of traditional office-based employment

exampleEn: The airline routinely and deliberately overbook its most popular long-haul international flights by up to ten percent of the total available passenger seating capacity carefully calculating that a predictable percentage of confirmed ticket holders will reliably fail to show up for their scheduled departure time due to last-minute plan changes missed connections or unexpected personal circumstances that prevent them from traveling to the airport and checking in on time for their intended flight.
exampleZh: Airline  routinely and deliberately overbook 其最受欢迎的 long-haul international flights 超过 total available passenger seating capacity 的 up to ten percent  carefully calculating that a predictable percentage of confirmed ticket holders 将 reliably fail to show up for their scheduled departure time 由于 last-minute plan changes missed connections or unexpected personal circumstances that prevent them from traveling to the airport and checking in on time for their intended flight

exampleEn: The furious passenger demanded to speak directly with the airline's most senior station manager after being abruptly informed at the departure gate that her confirmed business class seat on the oversold flight had been given away to someone else and that she would now have to wait at least another six uncomfortable hours in the crowded noisy departure terminal for the next available flight to her important business meeting destination the following morning.
exampleZh: Furious passenger demanded to speak directly with the airline's most senior station manager 在 departure gate 被 abruptly informed that her confirmed business class seat on the oversold flight had been given away to someone else 并且她现在不得不在 crowded noisy departure terminal 至少再等 another six uncomfortable hours 才能搭乘下一班 available flight 前往她第二年上午 important business meeting destination 之后

exampleEn: All international travelers must ensure that their national passport remains valid for at least six full months beyond their planned return date before departing on any overseas trip because many foreign countries strictly enforce this widely adopted minimum passport validity requirement and will refuse entry to any arriving visitor whose travel document is due to expire sooner than this standard six-month regulatory grace period window allows.
exampleZh: All international travelers must ensure that their national passport remains valid for at least six full months beyond their planned return date before departing on any overseas trip 因为许多 foreign countries strictly enforce this widely adopted minimum passport validity requirement 并将 refuse entry to any arriving visitor whose travel document is due to expire sooner than this standard six-month regulatory grace period window allows

exampleEn: The iconic transcontinental railway stretching over nine thousand kilometers from one end of the vast country to the other took nearly twenty-five years of brutal backbreaking human labor to complete through some of the most rugged and inhospitable mountain terrain on the face of the earth and remains to this day one of the greatest and most ambitious civil engineering achievements in the entire recorded history of human infrastructure construction and transportation network development and expansion.
exampleZh: Stretching over nine thousand kilometers from one end of the vast country to the other 的 iconic transcontinental railway took nearly twenty-five years of brutal backbreaking human labor to complete through some of the most rugged and inhospitable mountain terrain on the face of the earth 并且至今仍然是 the entire recorded history of human infrastructure construction and transportation network development and expansion 中 greatest and most ambitious civil engineering achievements 之一

exampleEn: The exclusive all-inclusive beachfront resort nestled among swaying palm trees on a pristine private tropical island accessible only by a thirty-minute seaplane flight from the nearest international airport catered primarily to wealthy newlywed honeymoon couples and affluent retirees seeking a quiet luxurious and completely stress-free escape from the relentless pressures and demands of their busy everyday professional lives and responsibilities back home in the crowded and noisy modern urban world.
exampleZh: Nestled among swaying palm trees on a pristine private tropical island accessible only by a thirty-minute seaplane flight from the nearest international airport 的 exclusive all-inclusive beachfront resort 主要 catered to wealthy newlywed honeymoon couples and affluent retirees seeking a quiet luxurious and completely stress-free escape from the relentless pressures and demands of their busy everyday professional lives and responsibilities back home in the crowded and noisy modern urban world

exampleEn: The tour group only had a very limited window of just three rushed hours to sightsee around the historic old town center before the bus driver insisted it was absolutely necessary to depart immediately in order to stay on the tightly packed itinerary schedule and reach their next distant overnight hotel stop before darkness fell over the winding and poorly lit mountain roads that still lay many hours of driving ahead of them that evening.
exampleZh: Tour group only had a very limited window of just three rushed hours to sightsee around the historic old town center 然后 bus driver insisted it was absolutely necessary to immediately depart 以 stay on the tightly packed itinerary schedule 并在 darkness fell over the winding and poorly lit mountain roads that still lay many hours of driving ahead of them that evening 之前 reach their next distant overnight hotel stop

exampleEn: Traveling solo for an extended period through unfamiliar foreign lands and cultures can be an intensely challenging yet ultimately deeply rewarding and personally transformative life experience that pushes individuals far beyond their normal psychological comfort zones and forces them to develop greater self-reliance adaptability and quiet inner confidence in their own resourcefulness and ability to navigate the unpredictable challenges and unexpected opportunities that arise along the open road ahead.
exampleZh: Traveling solo for an extended period through unfamiliar foreign lands and cultures 可以是一种 intensely challenging yet ultimately deeply rewarding and personally transformative life experience 这种经历将 individuals 远远 pushed beyond their normal psychological comfort zones 并 forces them to develop greater self-reliance adaptability and quiet inner confidence in their own resourcefulness and ability to navigate the unpredictable challenges and unexpected opportunities that arise along the open road ahead

exampleEn: The guided walking tour of the ancient medieval quarter of the historic old city offered fascinated visitors a vivid and surprisingly detailed glimpse into what everyday urban life must have actually been like for ordinary men women and children living and working within these same narrow cobblestone streets and surviving inside these same thick stone building walls over six hundred years before the present modern age of smartphones and instant global digital communication and connectivity across the planet.
exampleZh: Guided walking tour of the ancient medieval quarter of the historic old city 为 fascinated visitors 提供了一个 vivid and surprisingly detailed glimpse into what everyday urban life must have actually been like for ordinary men women and children living and working within these same narrow cobblestone streets and surviving inside these same thick stone building walls over six hundred years before the present modern age of smartphones and instant global digital communication and connectivity across the planet

exampleEn: The experienced global traveler had learned through years of hard-won personal trial and error across dozens of different countries and cultures on multiple continents that packing far too many unnecessary items of clothing and heavy luggage than one realistically needs for a comfortable journey was the single most common and easily avoidable mistake that inexperienced first-time tourists and enthusiastic but naive novice backpackers and vacationers consistently and predictably made on their initial exciting adventures abroad.
exampleZh: Experienced global traveler 通过多年在多个大洲数十个不同国家和文化中的 hard-won personal trial and error 已经 learn 到 packing far too many unnecessary items of clothing and heavy luggage than one realistically needs for a comfortable journey 是 inexperienced first-time tourists and enthusiastic but naive novice backpackers and vacationers 在其 initial exciting adventures abroad 时 consistently and predictably made 的 single most common and easily avoidable mistake

exampleEn: The grueling ten-day high-altitude trek to the remote base camp of the world's tallest and most formidable mountain peak tested every ounce of the exhausted climbers' physical endurance mental toughness and unshakable personal determination as they slowly pushed their aching oxygen-starved bodies forward step by agonizing step through howling freezing winds and blinding swirling snow squalls toward their distant ultimate destination goal still some three thousand vertical meters of steep technical climbing above their current precarious exposed position on the windswept and avalanche-prone mountainside.
exampleZh: Grueling ten-day high-altitude trek 到世界最高最 formidable mountain peak 的 remote base camp 考验了 exhausted climbers 的每一分 physical endurance mental toughness and unshakable personal determination 他们在 howling freezing winds and blinding swirling snow squalls 中 slowly pushed their aching oxygen-starved bodies向前一步又一步 agonizing step 朝着仍在其 current precarious exposed position on the windswept and avalanche-prone mountainside 上方约三千米 steep technical climbing 的 distant ultimate destination goal 前进

exampleEn: International travelers visiting certain tropical developing countries in remote parts of Africa South America and Southeast Asia are strongly advised by public health authorities to vaccinate themselves against a range of serious and potentially life-threatening infectious tropical diseases including yellow fever typhoid fever and hepatitis A and B at least four to six weeks before their scheduled departure date to allow sufficient time for the protective immunological response to fully develop and provide the intended effective medical protection against infection during their upcoming travel abroad.
exampleZh: International travelers visiting certain tropical developing countries in remote parts of Africa South America and Southeast Asia 被 public health authorities strongly advised 在 scheduled departure date 前至少四到六周 vaccinate themselves against a range of serious and potentially life-threatening infectious tropical diseases including yellow fever typhoid fever and hepatitis A and B 以允许 sufficient time for the protective immunological response to fully develop and provide the intended effective medical protection against infection during their upcoming travel abroad

exampleEn: The historic round-the-world sailing voyage retracing the exact route of the famous nineteenth-century scientific expedition took the modern crew of dedicated adventurers and marine researchers just under three years to fully complete covering a total sailing distance of over forty-five thousand nautical miles across all five of the world's major interconnected oceanic bodies of salt water between the seven inhabited continents of the planet Earth.
exampleZh: Historic round-the-world sailing voyage retracing the exact route of the famous nineteenth-century scientific expedition 花了 dedicated adventurers and marine researchers 的 modern crew just under three years 来 fully complete 在 planet Earth 的七个 inhabited continents 之间的世界五大 interconnected oceanic bodies of salt water 中 covering a total sailing distance of over forty-five thousand nautical miles

exampleEn: A well-written resume should highlight relevant skills and measurable achievements rather than simply listing previous job titles and responsibilities.
exampleZh: 一份 well-written resume 应 highlight 相关技能和可衡量的成就 而不仅仅是列出以前的职位和职责

exampleEn: The summer internship program provides university students with invaluable hands-on experience in their chosen professional field before graduation.
exampleZh: 暑期 internship 项目为大学生在毕业前提供了其 chosen professional field 中宝贵的 hands-on 经验

exampleEn: Merit-based scholarship programs help attract talented students from diverse socioeconomic backgrounds to top universities worldwide.
exampleZh: 基于成绩的 scholarship 项目有助于吸引来自 diverse socioeconomic backgrounds 的 talented students 到世界各地的顶尖大学

exampleEn: Modern pedagogy emphasizes active learning and critical thinking over passive memorization of facts and formulaic knowledge.
exampleZh: Modern pedagogy 强调 active learning and critical thinking 而非被动记忆事实和公式化知识

exampleEn: Children need regular outdoor recess periods throughout the school day to maintain focus and burn off excess physical energy between lessons.
exampleZh: Children 在 school day 中需要 regular outdoor recess 时间以在课程之间保持专注并消耗 excess physical energy

exampleEn: The UNESCO biosphere reserve program protects unique ecosystems where sustainable human development coexists with nature conservation.
exampleZh: UNESCO biosphere 保护区项目保护 unique ecosystems 在这些地方 sustainable human development 与 nature conservation 共存

exampleEn: High water turbidity after heavy rainfall can temporarily disrupt aquatic ecosystems by blocking sunlight from reaching submerged plants.
exampleZh: 暴雨后 High water turbidity 可通过阻止阳光到达 submerged plants 而 temporarily disrupt aquatic ecosystems

exampleEn: Permaculture design principles mimic natural ecosystems to create sustainable food production systems requiring minimal external inputs.
exampleZh: permaculture 设计原则 mimic natural ecosystems 以创建需要 minimal external inputs 的 sustainable food production systems

exampleEn: Nanotechnology is revolutionizing medicine by enabling targeted drug delivery directly to diseased cells without harming surrounding healthy tissues.
exampleZh: nanotechnology 正在通过 enable targeted drug delivery directly to diseased cells without harming surrounding healthy tissues 而 revolutionize medicine

exampleEn: Biotechnology firms are developing drought-resistant crop varieties that could help farmers adapt to increasingly unpredictable climate conditions globally.
exampleZh: biotechnology firms 正在 developing drought-resistant crop varieties that could help farmers adapt to increasingly unpredictable climate conditions globally

exampleEn: Telemedicine platforms experienced explosive growth during the pandemic allowing patients to consult doctors remotely via video calls from their homes.
exampleZh: telemedicine platforms 在 pandemic 期间经历了 explosive growth 允许 patients 从家中通过 video calls remotely consult doctors

exampleEn: The hospital's new inpatient wing features private rooms with advanced monitoring equipment and space for family members to stay comfortably overnight during extended treatment periods.
exampleZh: Hospital's new inpatient wing 设有 private rooms with advanced monitoring equipment and space for family members to stay comfortably overnight during extended treatment periods

exampleEn: Outpatient surgery allows patients to return home on the same day as their procedure significantly reducing hospital costs and bed occupancy rates across the healthcare system.
exampleZh: outpatient surgery 允许 patients 在手术当天 return home 显著 reducing hospital costs and bed occupancy rates across the healthcare system

exampleEn: The ancient Roman coliseum could seat over fifty thousand spectators and featured an elaborate underground system of tunnels and holding chambers for gladiators and wild animals awaiting their turn to enter the arena floor above through hidden trapdoors and mechanical lift platforms.
exampleZh: Ancient Roman coliseum 可容纳 over fifty thousand spectators 并设有 elaborate underground system of tunnels and holding chambers for gladiators and wild animals awaiting their turn to enter the arena floor above through hidden trapdoors and mechanical lift platforms

exampleEn: The company filed for insolvency protection after failing to negotiate a restructuring agreement with its largest creditors and bondholders last month.
exampleZh: 该公司在 failing to negotiate a restructuring agreement with its largest creditors and bondholders last month 后 filed for insolvency protection

exampleEn: Properly sterilized glass labware is essential for preventing cross-contamination between different experimental samples in microbiology research settings.
exampleZh: Properly sterilized glass labware 对于在 microbiology research 环境中 prevent cross-contamination between different experimental samples 至关重要

exampleEn: The laboratory centrifuge spins samples at over fifteen thousand rotations per minute to separate blood components by density for further detailed medical analysis.
exampleZh: Laboratory centrifuge 以超过每分钟一万五千转的速度 spins samples 以按密度 separate blood components 以进行 further detailed medical analysis

exampleEn: The aviation industry has committed to achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2050 through sustainable fuels and more efficient aircraft engine designs.
exampleZh: aviation industry 已承诺通过 sustainable fuels and more efficient aircraft engine designs 到2050年 achieve net-zero carbon emissions

exampleEn: The small regional airfield primarily serves private aircraft and flight training schools rather than scheduled commercial passenger airline services to major city destinations.
exampleZh: Small regional airfield 主要服务于 private aircraft and flight training schools 而不是 scheduled commercial passenger airline services to major city destinations

exampleEn: The evening newscast attracts over ten million nightly viewers making it the most-watched television news program in the entire country for over two decades running.
exampleZh: Evening newscast 每晚 attracts over ten million nightly viewers 使其成为全国 most-watched television news program 已超过二十年

exampleEn: Before the widespread availability of international telephone calls and internet email the telegram was the fastest way to send urgent written messages across continents and vast oceans separating distant countries and their citizens.
exampleZh: 在 international telephone calls and internet email 被 widespread available 之前 telegram 是 across continents and vast oceans separating distant countries and their citizens 发送 urgent written messages 的最快方式

exampleEn: Journalists often transcribe hours of recorded interview audio into written notes before selecting the most relevant and compelling quotes for their published news articles and feature stories.
exampleZh: Journalists 经常在为其 published news articles and feature stories selecting the most relevant and compelling quotes 之前将数小时 recorded interview audio transcribe 为书面 notes

exampleEn: The bill must pass through both the lower house and the senate before being sent to the president for final executive approval and official signature into binding national law.
exampleZh: 该 bill 必须通过 lower house 和 senate 然后才能被送至 president 进行 final executive approval and official signature into binding national law

exampleEn: The state governor announced a new infrastructure spending package worth over two billion dollars aimed at upgrading aging bridges and expanding broadband internet access to underserved rural communities across the entire state territory.
exampleZh: State governor announced a new infrastructure spending package worth over two billion dollars aimed at upgrading aging bridges and expanding broadband internet access to underserved rural communities across the entire state territory

exampleEn: In many traditional cultures kinship networks provide the primary form of social security with extended family members supporting each other through illness unemployment and old age without relying on government welfare programs.
exampleZh: 在许多 traditional cultures 中 kinship networks 提供 primary form of social security  extended family members 在 illness unemployment and old age 中相互支持 而不 rely on government welfare programs

exampleEn: Both genetic inheritance and environmental nurture play complex interacting roles in shaping a child's personality cognitive abilities and long-term mental health outcomes throughout their developmental years.
exampleZh: Both genetic inheritance and environmental nurture 在塑造儿童的 personality cognitive abilities and long-term mental health outcomes throughout their developmental years 中 play complex interacting roles

exampleEn: The medieval town center has been designated as a protected UNESCO world heritage site attracting millions of international cultural tourists and history enthusiasts to its narrow cobblestone streets each year.
exampleZh: Medieval town center 已被 designated 为受保护的 UNESCO world heritage site 每年吸引数百万 international cultural tourists and history enthusiasts 到其狭窄的鹅卵石街道

exampleEn: The scientific expedition to the remote Antarctic research station will study the effects of climate change on penguin populations and the rapidly melting polar ice sheets over a period of eighteen continuous months on the frozen southern continent.
exampleZh: Scientific expedition 到 remote Antarctic research station 将研究 climate change 对 penguin populations and the rapidly melting polar ice sheets 的影响 为期在 frozen southern continent 上 eighteen continuous months

exampleEn: The two political parties formed an unexpected strategic alliance to pass the controversial constitutional amendment through parliament despite their long history of bitter ideological rivalry and mutual distrust.
exampleZh: 两个政党形成了 unexpected strategic alliance 以在 parliament 通过 controversial constitutional amendment 尽管他们有长期的 bitter ideological rivalry and mutual distrust 的历史

exampleEn: The new municipal noise ordinance prohibits construction work before seven in the morning and after eight in the evening on weekdays in residential neighborhoods across the entire city jurisdiction.
exampleZh: New municipal noise ordinance 禁止在 residential neighborhoods 中工作日早上七点前和晚上八点后在 the entire city jurisdiction 进行 construction work

exampleEn: The young apprentice spent three years learning traditional carpentry skills under the patient guidance of a master craftsman before qualifying to work independently on his own furniture commissions.
exampleZh: Young apprentice spent three years learning traditional carpentry skills under the patient guidance of a master craftsman 然后 qualifying to work independently on his own furniture commissions

exampleEn: Being digitally literate is now as fundamentally important for full participation in modern society as traditional reading and writing literacy was for previous generations throughout the industrial age of the nineteenth and twentieth centuries.
exampleZh: Being digitally literate 现在对于 fully participate in modern society as fundamentally important 正如 traditional reading and writing literacy 对于 nineteenth and twentieth centuries 的 industrial age 中的 previous generations 一样

exampleEn: The destruction of natural wetland habitat for agricultural development has led to a dramatic decline in migratory bird populations across the entire East Asian flyway region over the past three decades.
exampleZh: 为 agricultural development 而 destruction of natural wetland habitat 已导致过去三十年中 entire East Asian flyway region 中 migratory bird populations 的 dramatic decline

exampleEn: Efficient drip irrigation systems can reduce agricultural water consumption by up to sixty percent compared to traditional flood irrigation methods while maintaining or even improving crop yields for farmers in water-scarce arid and semi-arid regions worldwide.
exampleZh: Efficient drip irrigation systems 与传统的 flood irrigation methods 相比可将 agricultural water consumption 减少高达百分之六十 同时为 water-scarce arid and semi-arid regions 的 farmers maintain or even improve crop yields

exampleEn: The licensed physical therapist designed a personalized twelve-week rehabilitation exercise program to help the patient regain full range of motion and strength following major reconstructive knee surgery last month.
exampleZh: Licensed physical therapist designed a personalized twelve-week rehabilitation exercise program 以帮助 patient 在上个月 major reconstructive knee surgery 后 regain full range of motion and strength

exampleEn: Corporate wellness programs that encourage regular exercise stress management and healthy eating habits can significantly reduce employee absenteeism and long-term healthcare costs for large organizations over time.
exampleZh: 鼓励定期 exercise stress management and healthy eating habits 的 Corporate wellness programs 可 significantly reduce employee absenteeism and long-term healthcare costs for large organizations over time

exampleEn: The illuminated medieval manuscript features intricate gold leaf decorations and hand-painted illustrations depicting scenes from daily monastic life in the fifteenth century monastery workshop where it was painstakingly created.
exampleZh: Illuminated medieval manuscript 以 intricate gold leaf decorations and hand-painted illustrations 为特色 描绘了十五世纪 monastery workshop 中 daily monastic life 的场景 它就是在那里被 painstakingly created

exampleEn: Medieval craft guild strictly regulated the training of new apprentices the quality standards of finished goods and the prices at which members could sell their products in the town marketplace during the Middle Ages across much of Europe.
exampleZh: Medieval craft guild 严格 regulate 了新 apprentices 的 training  finished goods 的 quality standards 以及 members 在 town marketplace 中 sell their products 的 prices 在 Middle Ages across much of Europe 期间

exampleEn: The small-scale pilot study showed promising preliminary results warranting a much larger randomized controlled trial with several thousand participants across multiple hospital sites throughout the country over the next three years.
exampleZh: Small-scale pilot study showed promising preliminary results warranting a much larger randomized controlled trial with several thousand participants across multiple hospital sites throughout the country over the next three years

exampleEn: The protected greenbelt surrounding the sprawling metropolitan area prevents uncontrolled urban sprawl and provides accessible natural recreational spaces for millions of city residents to enjoy during weekends and holidays throughout the year.
exampleZh: Protected greenbelt surrounding the sprawling metropolitan area 防止 uncontrolled urban sprawl 并为数百万 city residents 在全年 weekends and holidays 期间享受 accessible natural recreational spaces 提供了条件

exampleEn: The digital newsroom has fundamentally transformed over the past decade with real-time audience analytics dashboards now prominently displayed on large screens throughout the open-plan office influencing editorial decisions about which developing stories to prioritize and feature more prominently on the homepage.
exampleZh: Digital newsroom 在过去 decade 中 fundamentally transformed  real-time audience analytics dashboards 现在 prominently displayed on large screens throughout the open-plan office 影响着关于哪些 developing stories 要 prioritize and feature more prominently on the homepage 的 editorial decisions

exampleEn: The family solicitor handled all the complex legal paperwork required for the elderly couple to transfer ownership of their modest home and remaining financial assets into a carefully structured trust fund for the benefit of their three grandchildren.
exampleZh: Family solicitor handled all the complex legal paperwork required for the elderly couple to transfer ownership of their modest home and remaining financial assets into a carefully structured trust fund for the benefit of their three grandchildren

exampleEn: The university's active alumni network provides graduating students with valuable mentoring opportunities career advice and professional connections across industries worldwide helping them launch successful careers after completing their studies on campus.
exampleZh: University's active alumni network 为 graduating students 提供了 valuable mentoring opportunities career advice and professional connections across industries worldwide 帮助他们在 on campus 完成 studies 后 launch successful careers

exampleEn: Financial literacy education in secondary schools can help young people make more informed decisions about student loans credit cards and long-term savings from the very beginning of their independent adult financial lives.
exampleZh: Financial literacy education in secondary schools 可以帮助 young people 从 independent adult financial lives 的一开始就做出关于 student loans credit cards and long-term savings 的更 informed decisions

exampleEn: The professor provided a clear assignment template showing students exactly how to structure their research papers with proper section headings citation formats and bibliography layout requirements for the course.
exampleZh: Professor provided a clear assignment template showing students exactly how to structure their research papers with proper section headings citation formats and bibliography layout requirements for the course

exampleEn: Each online learning module includes short instructional videos interactive quizzes and downloadable practice exercises that students can complete at their own pace from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.
exampleZh: 每个 online learning module 包括 short instructional videos interactive quizzes and downloadable practice exercises 学生可以在有 reliable internet connection 的任何地方按自己的 pace complete those

exampleEn: Offshore wind farms harness the steady ocean breeze to generate clean renewable electricity for hundreds of thousands of coastal homes and businesses located along the windy shoreline throughout the region.
exampleZh: Offshore wind farms harness the steady ocean breeze 以 generate clean renewable electricity for hundreds of thousands of coastal homes and businesses located along the windy shoreline throughout the region

exampleEn: The dense rainforest canopy supports an astonishing diversity of plant and animal life with scientists estimating that over half of all terrestrial species on Earth live in this rich elevated forest layer high above the dark shaded forest floor far below them.
exampleZh: Dense rainforest canopy supports an astonishing diversity of plant and animal life 科学家 estimate 地球上超过一半的 terrestrial species 生活在 high above the dark shaded forest floor far below them 的 rich elevated forest layer 中

exampleEn: Advanced artificial intelligence systems can now help radiologists diagnose certain types of cancer from medical scan images with accuracy rates approaching and sometimes even exceeding those of experienced human specialist doctors working independently without AI decision support tools.
exampleZh: Advanced artificial intelligence systems 现在可以帮助 radiologists 从 medical scan images 中 diagnose 某些类型的 cancer 其 accuracy rates approaching and sometimes even exceeding those of experienced human specialist doctors working independently without AI decision support tools

exampleEn: The ancient harvest ritual involves the entire village community gathering at dawn to offer the first cut of ripened grain to the local temple deity before the main annual harvest work can officially begin across all the surrounding terraced rice paddies in the valley below.
exampleZh: Ancient harvest ritual 涉及整个 village community 在黎明时 gathering to offer the first cut of ripened grain to the local temple deity 然后 main annual harvest work 才能在下面 valley across all the surrounding terraced rice paddies officially begin

exampleEn: The government increased the protective import tariff on foreign steel by twenty-five percent in an effort to shield struggling domestic steel manufacturers from intense international price competition and prevent further job losses in the national industrial manufacturing workforce and supply chain sector.
exampleZh: Government 将对进口外国钢铁的 protective import tariff 提高了百分之二十五 以 effort to shield struggling domestic steel manufacturers from intense international price competition and prevent further job losses 在 national industrial manufacturing workforce and supply chain sector 中

exampleEn: The international maritime shipping industry transports over eighty percent of all globally traded goods by volume making it the backbone of the modern interconnected world economy and the primary physical means by which consumer products from clothing to electronics reach retail store shelves in every country across every inhabited continent on the face of our planet.
exampleZh: International maritime shipping industry transports over eighty percent of all globally traded goods by volume 使其成为 modern interconnected world economy 的 backbone 以及 consumer products from clothing to electronics 到达 retail store shelves in every country across every inhabited continent on the face of our planet 的 primary physical means

exampleEn: The shallow turquoise lagoon surrounded by a pristine white sand atoll offered the honeymoon couple the perfect secluded tropical swimming spot with crystal-clear warm calm waters gently lapping against the shore under the bright midday equatorial sun directly overhead.
exampleZh: Shallow turquoise lagoon surrounded by a pristine white sand atoll 为 honeymoon couple 提供了一个 perfect secluded tropical swimming spot with crystal-clear warm calm waters gently lapping against the shore under the bright midday equatorial sun directly overhead
